def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY


    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            # with st.popover("☰"):
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()

        accept_file_type = []
        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"
        chat_input_placeholder_file_str = ""

        # func_create_new_chat = lambda: None
        current_model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else chatbot_models_config[0]
        current_model = current_model_config["model"]
        current_enable_vision = True if current_model_config.get("vision") else False
        current_enable_code_interpreter = True if current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") and st.session_state[
            key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] else False
        current_enable_file_search = True if current_model_config.get("file_search") and st.session_state[
            key_enable_file_search_toggle] else False
        current_service_tier_list = current_model_config.get("service_tier", [])

        match current_model:
            # case gpt series
            case current_model if current_model.startswith('gpt') or re.match(r'^o\d+', current_model):
                if current_enable_vision:
                    accept_file_type.extend(
                        [
                            "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "pdf"
                        ]
                    )
                    chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"

                if current_enable_code_interpreter:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    dataset_file_type = ["csv", "xlsx", "xml", "css", "ts", "zip"]
                    accept_file_type.extend(dataset_file_type)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s), dataset file(s)"
                elif current_enable_file_search:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s)"

        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

        with chat_input_cols[2]:

            # @ st.fragment
            def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_file_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_interpreter: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_image_output: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_web_search: bool = False,
                    enable_reasoning_effort: bool = False,
                    in_reasoning_effort_options = REASONING_EFFORT_LIST,
                    allow_enable_service_tier: bool = False
            ):
                if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        with st.expander("Model setting", expanded=True, icon='⚙️'):
                            if allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list:
                                if PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY not in st.session_state or st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] is None:
                                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = current_service_tier_list[0]

                                def on_change_service_tier_radio():
                                    if st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                        print(f"on_change_service_tier - {st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]}")

                                st.radio(
                                    "Service tier",
                                    options=current_service_tier_list,
                                    key=PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                    horizontal=True,
                                    index=current_service_tier_list.index(st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]),
                                    on_change=on_change_service_tier_radio,
                                    help="For faster processing, try the priority processing service tier. For lower prices with higher latency, try the flex processing tier."
                                )

                            if enable_reasoning_effort:
                                if PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                                    st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = in_reasoning_effort_options[1]

                                def on_change_reasoning_effort():
                                    if st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                        print(f"on_change_reasoning_effort - {st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]}")

                                # reset reasoning effort for different model reasoning effort list
                                def reset_reasoning_effort(index=1):
                                    st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = in_reasoning_effort_options[index]
                                    return index

                                st.radio(
                                    "Reasoning effort",
                                    options=in_reasoning_effort_options,
                                    key=PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                    horizontal=True,
                                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                                    index=in_reasoning_effort_options.index(st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]) if (st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] in in_reasoning_effort_options) else reset_reasoning_effort(),
                                    on_change=on_change_reasoning_effort,
                                    help="Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models. Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response."
                                )

                        with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):

                            if allow_enable_file_search:
                                def on_change_enable_file_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_file_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable file search",
                                    key=key_enable_file_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_file_search_toggle,
                                    help="Enables models to retrieve information in a knowledge base of previously uploaded files through semantic and keyword search"
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.vector_store_files_management()
                                    except Exception as vector_store_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_code_interpreter:
                                def on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable code interpreter",
                                    key=key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle,
                                    help="**Code execution:** Runs Python code to perform various computations and tasks.  \n**Data visualization:** Creates visualizations like graphs and charts directly from data to help users understand patterns and trends.  \n**File processing:** Reads and generates files, including images and data files, making it versatile for different data types."
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.container_files_management()
                                    except Exception as container_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_web_search:
                                def on_change_enable_web_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_web_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable web search",
                                    key=key_enable_web_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_web_search_toggle
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]:
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        def on_change_allowed_domains_text_area():
                                            if st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] != st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]:
                                                st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] = st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]
                                                print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_allowed_domains_text_area - {st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains]}")

                                        st.text_area(
                                            "Search only in these websites :blue-background[Optional]",
                                            height="content",
                                            value=st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains],
                                            key=key_web_search_allowed_domains_input,
                                            placeholder="e.g. en.wikipedia.org,arxiv.org",
                                            on_change=on_change_allowed_domains_text_area
                                        )
                                        st.caption(
                                            'Enter domains or subdomains like "example.com" or "blog.example.com". Full paths like "example.com/path" are not supported.')
                            # else:
                            #     st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = False

                            if allow_enable_image_output:
                                def on_change_enable_image_toggle():
                                    # print(f"st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_image_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable image output (gpt-image-1)",
                                    key=key_enable_image_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_image_toggle
                                )
                                # adv setting for image generation
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]:
                                    def on_change_image_size_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[key_image_size] != st.session_state[key_image_size_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_image_size] = st.session_state[key_image_size_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_image_size_radio - {st.session_state[key_image_size]}")

                                    def on_change_image_quality_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[key_image_quality] != st.session_state[key_image_quality_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_image_quality] = st.session_state[key_image_quality_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_image_quality_radio - {st.session_state[key_image_quality]}")

                                    # image_setting_cols = st.columns([1,15])
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        st.radio(
                                            "Image Size",
                                            options=SIZE_LIST,
                                            key=key_image_size_input,
                                            horizontal=True,
                                            index=SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_image_size]),
                                            on_change=on_change_image_size_radio
                                        )

                                        st.radio(
                                            "Image Quality",
                                            options=QUALITY_LIST,
                                            key=key_image_quality_input,
                                            horizontal=True,
                                            index=QUALITY_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_image_quality]),
                                            on_change=on_change_image_quality_radio
                                        )
                else:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        st.markdown("Disable input")

            in_allow_enable_file_search = current_model_config.get(
                "file_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("file_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_code_interpreter = current_model_config.get(
                "code_interpreter") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") else False
            in_enable_reasoning_effort = current_model_config.get(
                "reasoning") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("reasoning") else False
            in_allow_enable_image_output = current_model_config.get(
                "image_generation") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("image_generation") else False
            in_allow_enable_web_search = current_model_config.get(
                "web_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("web_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_service_tier = True if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("service_tier", []) else False
            in_reasoning_effort_options = current_model_config.get(
                "reasoning_effort_options") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("reasoning_effort_options") else REASONING_EFFORT_LIST

            adv_setting_input_handler(
                allow_enable_file_search=in_allow_enable_file_search,
                allow_enable_code_interpreter=in_allow_enable_code_interpreter,
                enable_reasoning_effort=in_enable_reasoning_effort,
                in_reasoning_effort_options=in_reasoning_effort_options,
                allow_enable_image_output=in_allow_enable_image_output,
                allow_enable_web_search=in_allow_enable_web_search,
                allow_enable_service_tier=in_allow_enable_service_tier
            )

def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        current_model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else \
        chatbot_models_config[0]
        current_model = current_model_config["model"]
        current_enable_vision = True if current_model_config.get("vision") else False

        # model input
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    # st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()

        # chat input
        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            accept_file_type = []
            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"

            match current_model:
                # case gpt series
                case current_model if current_model.startswith('gpt') or re.match(r'^o\d+', current_model):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        if 'search' not in current_model:
                            accept_file_type.extend(
                                [
                                    "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "pdf"
                                ]
                            )
                            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"
                        else:
                            accept_file_type.extend(
                                [
                                    "png", "jpeg", "jpg"
                                ]
                            )
                            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s)"

                # case gemini series
                case current_model if current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        accept_file_type.extend(
                            [
                                "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp",
                                "txt", "html", "xml", "java", "py",
                                "pdf"
                            ]
                        )
                        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF), text based file(s)"
                # case grok series
                case model if model.startswith('grok'):
                    if "vision" in model:
                        accept_file_type.extend(
                            [
                                "png", "jpeg", "jpg"
                            ]
                        )
                        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s)"


            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

        # adv setting
        with chat_input_cols[2]:
            # @ st.fragment
            def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_google_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_execution: bool = False,
                    in_current_model: str = current_model
            ):
                if allow_enable_google_search or allow_enable_code_execution:
                    if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                        with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                            # tools
                            with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):
                                if allow_enable_google_search:
                                    def on_change_enable_google_search_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_google_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle]}")

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable google search",
                                        key=key_enable_google_search_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_google_search_toggle,
                                        help="Grounding with Google Search connects the model with world knowledge, a wide possible range of topics, or up-to-date information on the internet."
                                    )
                    else:
                        with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                            st.markdown("Disable input")

            in_allow_enable_google_search = current_model_config.get("google_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("google_search") else False

            adv_setting_input_handler(
                allow_enable_google_search=in_allow_enable_google_search
            )

def artifacts_run_processing(run_id, input_processing_statement, if_markdown, interval_second, process_time_estimated):
    with st.chat_message("assistant"):
        run_messages = artifacts_openai_client.check_openai_run_with_progress_bar(st.session_state.threadID_artifacts, run_id,
                                                                      input_processing_statement, interval_second,
                                                                      process_time_estimated)
        # print(str(run_messages))
        st.session_state.messages_artifacts.extend(run_messages)
        for run_message in run_messages:
            artifacts_openai_client.load_message(run_message["content"], if_markdown)

def artifacts_toggle_full_preview_handler():
                    preview_col1, preview_col2, preview_col3 = st.columns([2, 1, 1])
                    with preview_col1:
                        # toggle_label = "Exit full preview" if st.session_state.artifacts_full_preview_mode else "Enable full preview"
                        toggle_label = "Full preview"
                        st.toggle(label=toggle_label, key='artifacts_toggle_full_preview',
                                  disabled=st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"])
                        # on change to rerun
                        if st.session_state.artifacts_full_preview_mode != st.session_state[
                            'artifacts_toggle_full_preview']:
                            st.session_state.artifacts_full_preview_mode = st.session_state['artifacts_toggle_full_preview']
                            print("trigger rerun")
                            st.rerun()
                    with preview_col2:
                        keys_html_artifacts = list(st.session_state.artifacts_html_temp_dict.keys())
                        key_html_artifacts = st.selectbox(label="Choose your artifacts", options=keys_html_artifacts,
                                                          key='artifacts_select_html',
                                                          label_visibility='collapsed',
                                                          disabled=st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"]
                                                          )

                    @st.dialog("Deploy artifacts", width="large")
                    def dialog_artifacts_deploy_handler(selected_key_html_artifact: str):
                        deploy_key_html_artifact = st.selectbox(
                            label="Choose your artifact html",
                            options=keys_html_artifacts,
                            key='dialog_artifacts_select_html',
                            # label_visibility='collapsed',
                            disabled=st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"],
                            index=keys_html_artifacts.index(selected_key_html_artifact)
                        )

                        temp_name = str(deploy_key_html_artifact).replace('\n', '')
                        temp_name = re.sub(r'^[0-9]*-Html-', '', temp_name)
                        temp_name = temp_name[:48]+'..' if len(temp_name) > 50 else temp_name
                        html_selected_artifact = st.session_state.artifacts_html_temp_dict[deploy_key_html_artifact]
                        deploy_artifact_tabs = st.tabs(["Submit Form", "Preview", "Code"])
                        with deploy_artifact_tabs[0]:
                            st_deploy_store_item(
                                type='Artifact',
                                ref_id=st.session_state.threadID_artifacts,
                                detail=html_selected_artifact,
                                temp_name=temp_name
                            )

                        with deploy_artifact_tabs[1]:
                            components.html(
                                html=html_selected_artifact,
                                height=600,
                                scrolling=True
                            )
                        with deploy_artifact_tabs[2]:
                            # st.write(html_artifacts_name)
                            status, status_msg = validate_file_name(f"{temp_name}.html")
                            if status:
                                st.download_button(
                                    label="Download Html",
                                    data=html_selected_artifact,
                                    file_name=f"{temp_name}.html",
                                    mime="text/html"
                                )
                            else:
                                st.warning(f"Invalid file name: {status_msg}")
                            st.container(height=400, border=False).code(html_selected_artifact)
                            # st.code(html_selected_artifact)

                    with preview_col3:
                        if st.button("Deploy", key='artifacts_btn_deploy', use_container_width=True,
                                     disabled=st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"]):
                            dialog_artifacts_deploy_handler(selected_key_html_artifact=key_html_artifacts)
                    iframe_container_empty = code_preview_container.empty()
                    with iframe_container_empty:
                        components.html(
                            html=st.session_state.artifacts_html_temp_dict[key_html_artifacts],
                            height=600,
                            scrolling=True
                        )

app/backend/st_pages/10_LF_AI_Artifacts..name: artifacts_chat_handler
app/backend/st_pages/10_LF_AI_Artifacts..source_code:
def artifacts_chat_handler(input_prompt: str = st.session_state.artifacts_chat_input):
    try:
        prompt = input_prompt
        print(prompt)
        artifacts_create_thread_if_empty()
        empty_chat_input.empty()
        st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"] = True
        empty_chat_input.chat_input(disabled=st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"],
                                    key='artifacts_chat_input_disable')
        auth.logging('LF AI Artifacts', 'Run', prompt, '')
        artifacts_openai_client.create_message(thread_id=st.session_state.threadID_artifacts, prompt=prompt)
        empty_help_info.empty()
        with st.chat_message("user"):
            st.markdown(streamlit_utils.custom_markdown_text(prompt))
            st.session_state.messages_artifacts.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
        # with chat_col:
        artifacts_run_streaming()
        st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"] = False
        reset_artifacts_html_temp_dict()
        st.rerun()
    except Exception as error:
        with st.chat_message("assistant"):
            st.session_state["artifacts_input_disable"] = False
            print(traceback.format_exc())
            st.error(error)
            streamlit_utils.button_rerun()

app/backend/st_pages/12_PPT_Creator.py::.source_code:
def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY


    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            # with st.popover("☰"):
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()

        accept_file_type = []
        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"
        chat_input_placeholder_file_str = ""

        # func_create_new_chat = lambda: None
        current_model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else chatbot_models_config[0]
        current_model = current_model_config["model"]
        current_enable_vision = True if current_model_config.get("vision") else False
        current_enable_code_interpreter = True if current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") and st.session_state[
            key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] else False
        current_enable_file_search = True if current_model_config.get("file_search") and st.session_state[
            key_enable_file_search_toggle] else False
        current_service_tier_list = current_model_config.get("service_tier", [])

        match current_model:
            # case gpt series
            case current_model if current_model.startswith('gpt') or re.match(r'^o\d+', current_model):
                if current_enable_vision:
                    accept_file_type.extend(
                        [
                            "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "pdf"
                        ]
                    )
                    chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"

                if current_enable_code_interpreter:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    dataset_file_type = ["csv", "xlsx", "xml", "css", "ts", "zip"]
                    accept_file_type.extend(dataset_file_type)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s), dataset file(s)"
                elif current_enable_file_search:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s)"

        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

        with chat_input_cols[2]:

            # @ st.fragment
            def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_file_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_interpreter: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_image_output: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_web_search: bool = False,
                    enable_reasoning_effort: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_service_tier: bool = False
            ):
                if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        with st.expander("Model setting", expanded=True, icon='⚙️'):
                            if allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list:
                                if PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY not in st.session_state or st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] is None:
                                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = current_service_tier_list[0]

                                def on_change_service_tier_radio():
                                    if st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                        print(f"on_change_service_tier - {st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]}")

                                st.radio(
                                    "Service tier",
                                    options=current_service_tier_list,
                                    key=PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                    horizontal=True,
                                    index=current_service_tier_list.index(st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]),
                                    on_change=on_change_service_tier_radio,
                                    help="For faster processing, try the priority processing service tier. For lower prices with higher latency, try the flex processing tier."
                                )

                            if enable_reasoning_effort:
                                if PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                                    st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = REASONING_EFFORT_LIST[1]

                                def on_change_reasoning_effort():
                                    if st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                        print(f"on_change_reasoning_effort - {st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]}")

                                st.radio(
                                    "Reasoning effort",
                                    options=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST,
                                    key=PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                    horizontal=True,
                                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                                    index=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST.index(st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]),
                                    on_change=on_change_reasoning_effort,
                                    help="Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models. Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response."
                                )

                        with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):

                            if allow_enable_file_search:
                                def on_change_enable_file_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_file_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable file search",
                                    key=key_enable_file_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_file_search_toggle,
                                    help="Enables models to retrieve information in a knowledge base of previously uploaded files through semantic and keyword search"
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.vector_store_files_management()
                                    except Exception as vector_store_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_code_interpreter:
                                def on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable code interpreter",
                                    key=key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle,
                                    help="**Code execution:** Runs Python code to perform various computations and tasks.  \n**Data visualization:** Creates visualizations like graphs and charts directly from data to help users understand patterns and trends.  \n**File processing:** Reads and generates files, including images and data files, making it versatile for different data types."
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.container_files_management()
                                    except Exception as container_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_web_search:
                                def on_change_enable_web_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_web_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable web search",
                                    key=key_enable_web_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_web_search_toggle
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]:
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        def on_change_allowed_domains_text_area():
                                            if st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] != st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]:
                                                st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] = st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]
                                                print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_allowed_domains_text_area - {st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains]}")

                                        st.text_area(
                                            "Search only in these websites :blue-background[Optional]",
                                            height="content",
                                            value=st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains],
                                            key=key_web_search_allowed_domains_input,
                                            placeholder="e.g. en.wikipedia.org,arxiv.org",
                                            on_change=on_change_allowed_domains_text_area
                                        )
                                        st.caption(
                                            'Enter domains or subdomains like "example.com" or "blog.example.com". Full paths like "example.com/path" are not supported.')
                            # else:
                            #     st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = False

                            if allow_enable_image_output:
                                def on_change_enable_image_toggle():
                                    # print(f"st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_image_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable image output (gpt-image-1)",
                                    key=key_enable_image_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_image_toggle
                                )
                                # adv setting for image generation
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]:
                                    def on_change_image_size_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[key_image_size] != st.session_state[key_image_size_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_image_size] = st.session_state[key_image_size_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_image_size_radio - {st.session_state[key_image_size]}")

                                    def on_change_image_quality_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[key_image_quality] != st.session_state[key_image_quality_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_image_quality] = st.session_state[key_image_quality_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_image_quality_radio - {st.session_state[key_image_quality]}")

                                    # image_setting_cols = st.columns([1,15])
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        st.radio(
                                            "Image Size",
                                            options=SIZE_LIST,
                                            key=key_image_size_input,
                                            horizontal=True,
                                            index=SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_image_size]),
                                            on_change=on_change_image_size_radio
                                        )

                                        st.radio(
                                            "Image Quality",
                                            options=QUALITY_LIST,
                                            key=key_image_quality_input,
                                            horizontal=True,
                                            index=QUALITY_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_image_quality]),
                                            on_change=on_change_image_quality_radio
                                        )
                else:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        st.markdown("Disable input")

            in_allow_enable_file_search = current_model_config.get(
                "file_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("file_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_code_interpreter = current_model_config.get(
                "code_interpreter") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") else False
            in_enable_reasoning_effort = current_model_config.get(
                "reasoning") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("reasoning") else False
            in_allow_enable_image_output = current_model_config.get(
                "image_generation") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("image_generation") else False
            in_allow_enable_web_search = current_model_config.get(
                "web_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("web_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_service_tier = True if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("service_tier", []) else False

            adv_setting_input_handler(
                allow_enable_file_search=in_allow_enable_file_search,
                allow_enable_code_interpreter=in_allow_enable_code_interpreter,
                enable_reasoning_effort=in_enable_reasoning_effort,
                allow_enable_image_output=in_allow_enable_image_output,
                allow_enable_web_search=in_allow_enable_web_search,
                allow_enable_service_tier=in_allow_enable_service_tier
            )

app/backend/st_pages/12_📑_PPT_Generator..name: _create_or_get_assistant
app/backend/st_pages/12_📑_PPT_Generator..source_code:
def _create_or_get_assistant(model: str = "gpt-4o") -> str:
    """Create or retrieve assistant with code interpreter"""
    if st.session_state.ppt_generator_assistant_id:
        try:
            OPENAI_CLIENT.beta.assistants.retrieve(st.session_state.ppt_generator_assistant_id)
            return st.session_state.ppt_generator_assistant_id
        except Exception:
            pass
    
    instructions = """You are an expert presentation creator. Your task is to create professional PowerPoint presentations.

IMPORTANT: Use your training knowledge and any research data provided to create comprehensive slide content. If you need current information beyond your knowledge cutoff, clearly state this limitation.

Your process:
1. Analyze the topic and create a structured outline
2. Develop detailed content for each slide
3. Use Python with python-pptx library to generate the actual PPTX file
4. Apply professional formatting based on the requested style

When generating PPT with python-pptx:
- Import: from pptx import Presentation, from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
- Create slides with appropriate layouts
- Use balanced fonts and spacing (e.g., Calibri, Arial)
- Keep slide content concise (max 6 bullets per slide)
- Apply color schemes appropriate for the style
- Include title slide with topic
- Save as output.pptx

Note: python-pptx is available in the code interpreter environment."""
    
    try:
        assistant = OPENAI_CLIENT.beta.assistants.create(
            name="PPT Generator Assistant",
            instructions=instructions,
            model=model,
            tools=[
                {"type": "code_interpreter"}
            ],
            timeout=60.0  # Add timeout
        )
        st.session_state.ppt_generator_assistant_id = assistant.id
        return assistant.id
    except Exception as e:
        st.error(f"Failed to create assistant: {str(e)[:100]}")
        st.info("Tip: OpenAI API may be experiencing issues. Please try again later.")
        st.stop()

def _build_agent_prompt(topic_text: str, pages: int, style: str, want_refs: bool) -> str:
    refs_section = """
   
4. Add references slide with 3-5 sources""" if want_refs else ""
    
    return f"""Create a professional PowerPoint presentation on this topic: "{topic_text}"

Requirements:
- Total slides: {pages}
- Style: {style} (Modern=calibrated/professional, Minimal=clean/minimal, Corporate=formal/traditional)
{refs_section}

Process:
1. Outline the key sections and bullet points based on your knowledge
2. Write Python code using python-pptx to generate the PPTX file
3. Apply the {style} style:
   * Modern: Use Calibri font, blue/gray color scheme, rounded shapes
   * Minimal: Use Arial font, black/white color scheme, simple layout
   * Corporate: Use Times New Roman font, navy/gold color scheme, formal layout

Code requirements:
- Use: from pptx import Presentation
- Use: from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
- Create title slide with topic as title
- Create content slides with headings and 4-6 bullet points per slide
- Set font sizes appropriately (title: 44pt, body: 18-24pt)
- Apply colors based on style
- Save as output.pptx

Start now by outlining, then writing and executing the Python code."""

app/backend/st_pages/13_LF_AI_Lab.py::ch.name: chat_input_container_handler
app/backend/st_pages/13_LF_AI_Lab.py::ch.source_code:
def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY

    gemini_search_active = st.session_state.get(key_enable_google_search_toggle, False)
    gemini_code_active = st.session_state.get(key_enable_code_execution_toggle, False)
    if gemini_search_active and gemini_code_active:
        st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = False
        gemini_search_active = False

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        current_model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else \
        chatbot_models_config[0]
        current_model = current_model_config["model"]
        current_enable_vision = True if current_model_config.get("vision") else False

        # model input
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    # st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()

        # chat input
        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            accept_file_type = []
            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"

            match current_model:
                # case gpt series
                case current_model if current_model.startswith('gpt') or re.match(r'^o\d+', current_model):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        if 'search' not in current_model:
                            accept_file_type.extend(
                                [
                                    "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "pdf"
                                ]
                            )
                            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"
                        else:
                            accept_file_type.extend(
                                [
                                    "png", "jpeg", "jpg"
                                ]
                            )
                            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s)"

                # case gemini series
                case current_model if current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        accept_file_type.extend(
                            [
                                "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp",
                                "txt", "html", "xml", "py",
                                "pdf", "csv", "md",
                                "java", "cpp", "js",
                                "docx", "pptx", "xlsx", "xls",
                                "wav", "mp3", "aiff", "aac", "ogg", "flac",
                                "mp4", "mpeg", "mov", "avi", "flv", "mpg", "webm", "wmv", "3gpp"
                            ]
                        )
                        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF), text based file(s)"
                    if gemini_code_active:
                        code_file_types = ["csv", "jpeg", "js", "png", "py", "xml", "cpp", "java"]
                        accept_file_type.extend(code_file_types)
                        # chat_input_placeholder += ", code files"

                # case grok series
                case model if model.startswith('grok'):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        accept_file_type.extend(
                            [
                                "png", "jpeg", "jpg",
                                "txt", "json", "md", "pdf", "csv",
                                "py", "js", "java", "cpp"
                            ]
                        )
                        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s)"
                # case claude series
                case current_model if current_model.startswith('claude'):
                    if current_enable_vision:
                        accept_file_type.extend(
                            [
                                "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "gif",
                                "pdf"
                            ]
                        )
                        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"


            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type,
                accept_audio=True
            )

        # adv setting
        with chat_input_cols[2]:
            # @ st.fragment
            def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_google_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_execution: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_url_context: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_web_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_x_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_collections_search: bool = False,
                    in_current_model: str = current_model
            ):
                if allow_enable_google_search or allow_enable_code_execution or allow_enable_x_search or allow_enable_web_search or allow_enable_collections_search:
                    if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                        with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                            # tools
                            with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):
                                if current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                                    # st.caption("ℹ️ **Note:** Only one tool can be active at a time.")
                                    st.caption("ℹ️ **Note:** Google search and code execution cannot be enabled simultaneously.")

                                if allow_enable_google_search:
                                    def on_change_enable_google_search_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_google_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle]}")

                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle]:
                                            # If google search is active, turn off code execution
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle] = False
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle_input] = False

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable google search",
                                        key=key_enable_google_search_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_google_search_toggle,
                                        # disabled=gemini_code_active,
                                        help="Grounding with Google Search connects the model with world knowledge, a wide possible range of topics, or up-to-date information on the internet."
                                    )

                                if allow_enable_code_execution:
                                    def on_change_enable_code_execution_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_code_execution_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle]}")

                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle]:
                                            # If code execution is active, turn off google search
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = False
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input] = False

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable code execution",
                                        key=key_enable_code_execution_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_code_execution_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_code_execution_toggle,
                                        # disabled=gemini_search_active,
                                        help="Allows the model to generate and run Python code to solve complex problems (math, data analysis, etc)."
                                    )

                                if allow_enable_url_context:
                                    def on_change_enable_url_context_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_url_context_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle]}")

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable url context",
                                        key=key_enable_url_context_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_url_context_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_url_context_toggle,
                                        help="Direct the model to read and analyze content from specific web pages or documents."
                                    )

                                if allow_enable_web_search:
                                    def on_change_enable_web_search_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_web_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]}")

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable web search",
                                        key=key_enable_web_search_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_web_search_toggle,
                                        # disabled=gemini_code_active,
                                        help="Real-time search across the internet with the ability to both search the web and browse web pages."
                                    )

                                if allow_enable_x_search:
                                    def on_change_enable_x_search_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_x_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle]}")

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable X search",
                                        key=key_enable_x_search_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_x_search_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_x_search_toggle,
                                        # disabled=gemini_code_active,
                                        help="Semantic and keyword search across X posts, users, and threads."
                                    )

                                if allow_enable_collections_search:
                                    def on_change_enable_collections_search_toggle():
                                        if st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle_input]:
                                            st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle_input]
                                            print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_collections_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle]}")

                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable collections search",
                                        key=key_enable_collections_search_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_collections_search_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_collections_search_toggle,
                                        # disabled=gemini_code_active,
                                        help="The model can search through your uploaded knowledge bases and collections to retrieve relevant information."
                                    )
                    else:
                        with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                            st.markdown("Disable input")

            in_allow_enable_google_search = current_model_config.get("google_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("google_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_code_execution = current_model_config.get("code_execution") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("code_execution") else False
            in_allow_enable_url_context = current_model_config.get("url_context") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("url_context") else False
            in_allow_enable_web_search = current_model_config.get("web_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("web_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_x_search = current_model_config.get("x_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("x_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_collections_search = current_model_config.get("collections_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("collections_search") else False

            adv_setting_input_handler(
                allow_enable_google_search=in_allow_enable_google_search,
                allow_enable_code_execution =in_allow_enable_code_execution,
                allow_enable_url_context=in_allow_enable_url_context,
                allow_enable_web_search=in_allow_enable_web_search,
                allow_enable_x_search=in_allow_enable_x_search,
                allow_enable_collections_search=in_allow_enable_collections_search
            )
