def dialog_config_router():
        client: AgentRouterChat = st.session_state[PAGE_AGENT_ROUTER_CHAT_CLIENT_ST_KEY]

        # if there is no agent list, use function to get agent list
        if not client.user_agents:
            # with st.spinner("Loading agents..."):
                # client.get_agent_list(st.session_state.userId)
            chat_client.async_get_agent_list()

        agents_data = client.user_agents

        data_for_df = []
        for idx, agent in enumerate(agents_data, start=1):
            image_url = agent.get("Thumbnail_Image_Url") or chat_client.default_icon
            data_for_df.append({
                "Enable": agent.get("Allow_Route", False),
                "Thumbnail_Image_Url": image_url,
                "Ref_Id": agent.get("Ref_Id"),
                "Name": agent.get("Name"),
                "Creator": agent.get("Creator"),
                "Usage": agent.get("Usage")
            })

        df = pd.DataFrame(data_for_df)


        # with st.form("router_config_form", border=False):
        st.caption("Manage which agents are enabled for routing.")

        # filter columns: search and filter by creators
        col1, col2 = st.columns(2)
        with col1:
            search_term = st.text_input("🔝 Search for Agent Name or Usage", placeholder="Enter keywords...")

        with col2:
            all_creators = set()
            if 'Creator' in df.columns:
                for creator_str in df['Creator'].dropna():
                    if isinstance(creator_str, str):
                        creators = [creator.strip() for creator in creator_str.split(',') if creator.strip()]
                        all_creators.update(creators)

            # creator_options = ["All"] + (sorted(list(all_creators)) if all_creators else [])
            creator_filter = st.multiselect(
                "👥 Author",
                options=sorted(list(all_creators)) if all_creators else [],
                placeholder="Select Authors to filter..."
            )

        filtered_df = df.copy()

        if search_term:
            mask = (
                    df['Name'].str.contains(search_term, case=False, na=False) |
                    df['Usage'].str.contains(search_term, case=False, na=False)
            )
            filtered_df = filtered_df[mask]

        if creator_filter:
            creator_mask = filtered_df['Creator'].apply(
                lambda x: any(creator in str(x) for creator in creator_filter) if pd.notna(x) else False
            )
            filtered_df = filtered_df[creator_mask]

        display_df = filtered_df.reset_index(drop=True)

            # # --- table headers (Index, Name, Usage, Creator, Allow Route) ---
            # header_cols = st.columns([1, 2, 4, 2, 1])
            # header_cols[0].markdown("**No.**")
            # header_cols[1].markdown("**Agent Name**")
            # header_cols[2].markdown("**Usage**")
            # header_cols[3].markdown("**Creator**")
            # header_cols[4].markdown("**Select**")
            #
            # st.markdown("<hr style='margin: 5px 0; opacity: 0.5;'>", unsafe_allow_html=True)
            #
            # # dic to save config change of the user
            # current_config_state = {}
            #
            # for idx, agent in enumerate(agents_data, start=1):
            #     cols = st.columns([1, 2, 4, 2, 1], vertical_alignment="center")
            #
            #     # Get fields of agents
            #     agent_id = agent.get("Ref_Id")
            #     name = agent.get("Name")
            #     usage = agent.get("Usage", "-")
            #     creator = agent.get("Creator", "-")
            #     is_allowed = agent.get("Allow_Route", False)
            #
            #     # 1. Index
            #     cols[0].write(str(idx))
            #
            #     # 2. Name (highlight)
            #     cols[1].write(f"**{name}**")
            #
            #     # 3. Usage
            #     cols[2].write(usage)
            #
            #     # 4. Creator
            #     cols[3].caption(creator)
            #
            #     # 5. Checkbox
            #     new_status = cols[4].checkbox(
            #         label="Enable",
            #         value=is_allowed,
            #         key=f"chk_{agent_id}",
            #         label_visibility="collapsed"  # hide label text
            #     )
            #
            #     # save state to temp dic
            #     current_config_state[agent_id] = new_status


        # 2. Setup Data Editor
        column_configuration = {
            "Enable": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(
                "Select",
                help="Check to enable routing for this agent",
                default=False
            ),
            "Thumbnail_Image_Url": st.column_config.ImageColumn(
                label="Icon"
            ),
            "Ref_Id": None,  # Hide agent ids
            "Name": st.column_config.TextColumn(
                "Agent Name",
                width="medium",
                help="The name of the agent",
                disabled=True  # Cannot edit
            ),
            "Usage": st.column_config.TextColumn(
                "Usage",
                width="large",
                help="Hover to see full description, double click to expand.",
                disabled=True
            ),
            "Creator": st.column_config.TextColumn(
                "Author",
                width="small",
                disabled=True
            )
        }

        # use data_editor
        edited_df = st.data_editor(
            display_df,
            column_config=column_configuration,
            hide_index=True,
            width="stretch",
            num_rows="fixed",
            height=600,
            key="agent_router_editor"
        )

        st.markdown("")

        # --- Submit button ---
        col_submit_l, col_submit_r = st.columns([3, 1])
        with col_submit_r:
            submitted = st.button("Save Changes", type="primary", width="stretch")

        if submitted:
            # use list to store config information
            updated_list = []
            # for a_id, a_status in current_config_state.items():
            #     updated_list.append({
            #         "Agent_Id": a_id,
            #         "Allow_Route": a_status
            #     })

            edited_records = edited_df.to_dict('records')

            for record in edited_records:
                updated_list.append({
                    "Agent_Id": record['Ref_Id'],
                    "Allow_Route": record['Enable']
                })
            # print(f"update list: {updated_list}")

            # submit the change of config list to config API
            with st.spinner("Updating configuration..."):
                # response = client.update_config_list(st.session_state.userId, updated_list)
                request_body = ConfigRouterRequest(upn=st.session_state.userId, config_list=updated_list)
                response = config_router_api(request_body, config_list=client.config_list, agent_list=client.user_agents, isValid=True)

            # if there is a response, print the response message in front end
            if response:
                if response.status_code == 304:
                    st.error("No change.")
                elif response.status_code == 200:
                    st.toast("✅ Configuration updated successfully!")
                    client.config_list = response.new_config_list
                    client.user_agents = response.new_agent_list
                    time.sleep(1)
                    st.rerun()
                else:
                    st.error(response.json().get('message'))
            else:
                st.error("Failed to update configuration.")

def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")

        # chat input
        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            accept_file_type = ["pdf", "txt", "docx", "pptx", "html", "json", "c", "cpp", "java", "md",
                                "php", "py",
                                "rb", "tex", "js",
                                "csv", "xlsx", "xml", "css", "jpeg", "jpg", "png", "gif", "tar","ts"]
            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach file(s)"

            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

def run_processing(run_id, input_processing_statement, if_markdown, interval_second, process_time_estimated):
    # empty_help_info.empty()
    # empty_expander.empty()
    with st.chat_message("assistant"):
        run_messages = openai_client.check_openai_run_with_progress_bar(st.session_state[PAGE_THREAD_ID_ST_KEY], run_id,
                                                                      input_processing_statement, interval_second,
                                                                      process_time_estimated)
        # print(str(run_messages))
        st.session_state[PAGE_MESSAGES_ST_KEY].extend(run_messages)
        for run_message in run_messages:
            openai_client.load_message(run_message["content"], if_markdown)

def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[
        PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1,6,1], vertical_alignment="bottom")

        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            # with st.popover("☰"):
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()
            model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else chatbot_models_config[0]
            # print(f"model_config: {model_config}")
            dataset_file_type = ["csv", "xlsx", "xml", "css", "ts", "zip"]
            accept_file_type = []
            chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"
            chat_input_placeholder_file_str = ""
            if model_config:
                if model_config.get('vision', False):
                    accept_file_type.extend(VISION_FILES_TYPE)
                    chat_input_placeholder_file_str = "image(s),"
                if model_config.get('file_search', False):
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    chat_input_placeholder_file_str = chat_input_placeholder_file_str + "text based file(s),"
                if model_config.get('code_interpreter', False):
                    accept_file_type.extend(dataset_file_type)
                    chat_input_placeholder_file_str = chat_input_placeholder_file_str + "dataset file(s)"
                if chat_input_placeholder_file_str:
                    chat_input_placeholder = f"{chat_input_placeholder} and/or attach {chat_input_placeholder_file_str.strip(',')}"
            # print(f"accept_file_type: {accept_file_type}")
        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            # with st.popover("☰"):
            @st.fragment
            def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()
                # print(f"st.session_state[{PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}] : {st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]}, type : {type(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY])}")

            model_input_handler()

        accept_file_type = []
        chat_input_placeholder = "Your message"

        current_model_config = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] else chatbot_models_config[0]
        current_model = current_model_config["model"]
        current_enable_vision = True if current_model_config.get("vision") else False
        current_enable_code_interpreter = True if current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") and st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] else False
        current_enable_file_search = True if current_model_config.get("file_search") and st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] else False
        current_service_tier_list = current_model_config.get("service_tier", [])



        match current_model:
            # case gpt series
            case current_model if current_model.startswith('gpt') or re.match(r'^o\d+', current_model):
                if current_enable_vision:
                    accept_file_type.extend(
                        [
                            "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp", "pdf"
                        ]
                    )
                    chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF)"
                if current_enable_code_interpreter:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    dataset_file_type = ["csv", "xlsx", "xml", "css", "ts", "zip"]
                    accept_file_type.extend(dataset_file_type)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s), dataset file(s)"
                elif current_enable_file_search:
                    accept_file_type.extend(FILE_SEARCH_FILES_TYPE)
                    chat_input_placeholder = chat_input_placeholder + ", text based file(s)"
            # case gemini series
            case current_model if current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                if current_enable_vision:
                    accept_file_type.extend(
                        [
                            "png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp",
                            "txt", "html", "xml", "java", "py",
                            "pdf"
                        ]
                    )
                    chat_input_placeholder = "Your message and/or attach image(s), PDF (support printed PDF), text based file(s)"

        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

        with chat_input_cols[2]:

            # @ st.fragment
            def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_file_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_interpreter: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_image_output: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_web_search: bool = False,
                    enable_reasoning_effort: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_service_tier: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_google_search: bool = False,
                    in_current_model: str = current_model
            ):
                if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        # model setting
                        if (allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list) or enable_reasoning_effort:
                            with st.expander("Model setting", expanded=True, icon='⚙️'):
                                if allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list:
                                    if PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY not in st.session_state or st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] is None:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = current_service_tier_list[0]

                                    def on_change_service_tier_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                            st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                            print(f"on_change_service_tier - {st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]}")

                                    st.radio(
                                        "Service tier",
                                        options=current_service_tier_list,
                                        key=PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                        horizontal=True,
                                        index=current_service_tier_list.index(st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]),
                                        on_change=on_change_service_tier_radio,
                                        help="For faster processing, try the priority processing service tier. For lower prices with higher latency, try the flex processing tier."
                                    )

                                if enable_reasoning_effort:
                                    if PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = REASONING_EFFORT_LIST[1]

                                    def on_change_reasoning_effort():
                                        if st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                            st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                            print(f"on_change_reasoning_effort - {st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]}")

                                    st.radio(
                                        "Reasoning effort",
                                        options=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST,
                                        key=PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                        horizontal=True,
                                        disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                                        index=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST.index(st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]),
                                        on_change=on_change_reasoning_effort,
                                        help="Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models. Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response."
                                    )

                        # tools
                        with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):
                            if allow_enable_file_search:
                                def on_change_enable_file_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_file_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable file search",
                                    key=key_enable_file_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_file_search_toggle,
                                    help="Enables models to retrieve information in a knowledge base of previously uploaded files through semantic and keyword search"
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.vector_store_files_management()
                                    except Exception as vector_store_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_code_interpreter:
                                def on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable code interpreter",
                                    key=key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle,
                                    help="**Code execution:** Runs Python code to perform various computations and tasks.  \n**Data visualization:** Creates visualizations like graphs and charts directly from data to help users understand patterns and trends.  \n**File processing:** Reads and generates files, including images and data files, making it versatile for different data types."
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.container_files_management()
                                    except Exception as container_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_web_search:
                                def on_change_enable_web_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_web_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable web search",
                                    key=key_enable_web_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_web_search_toggle
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]:
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        def on_change_allowed_domains_text_area():
                                            if st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] != st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]:
                                                st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] = st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]
                                                print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_allowed_domains_text_area - {st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains]}")

                                        st.text_area(
                                            "Search only in these websites :blue-background[Optional]",
                                            height="content",
                                            value=st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains],
                                            key=key_web_search_allowed_domains_input,
                                            placeholder="e.g. en.wikipedia.org,arxiv.org",
                                            on_change=on_change_allowed_domains_text_area
                                        )
                                        st.caption(
                                            'Enter domains or subdomains like "example.com" or "blog.example.com". Full paths like "example.com/path" are not supported.')
                            # else:
                            #     st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = False

                            if allow_enable_google_search:
                                def on_change_enable_google_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_google_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable google search",
                                    key=key_enable_google_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_google_search_toggle,
                                    help="Grounding with Google Search connects the model with world knowledge, a wide possible range of topics, or up-to-date information on the internet."
                                )


                            if allow_enable_image_output:
                                def on_change_enable_image_toggle():
                                    # print(f"st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_image_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")

                                # strictly enable image output when function group is 'Image Creator'
                                disable_toggle_image = False
                                if 'Image Creator' in PAGE_FUNCTION_GROUP:
                                    st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = True
                                    disable_toggle_image = True

                                if not disable_toggle_image:
                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable image output",
                                        key=key_enable_image_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_image_toggle,
                                        disabled=disable_toggle_image
                                    )
                                # adv setting for image generation
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]:
                                    # image_setting_cols = st.columns([1,15])
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        match in_current_model:
                                            # gpt image config
                                            case in_current_model if in_current_model.startswith('gpt'):
                                                def on_change_gpt_image_size_radio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size] != st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size] = st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gpt_image_size_radio - {st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size]}")

                                                def on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality] != st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality] = st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio - {st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality]}")

                                                st.radio(
                                                    "Image size",
                                                    options=SIZE_LIST,
                                                    key=key_gpt_image_size_input,
                                                    horizontal=True,
                                                    index=SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size]),
                                                    on_change=on_change_gpt_image_size_radio
                                                )

                                                st.radio(
                                                    "Image quality",
                                                    options=QUALITY_LIST,
                                                    key=key_gpt_image_quality_input,
                                                    horizontal=True,
                                                    index=QUALITY_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality]),
                                                    on_change=on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio
                                                )
                                            # gemini image config
                                            case in_current_model if in_current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                                                def on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio] != st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio] = st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio - {st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio]}")

                                                def on_change_gemini_image_size():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size] != st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size] = st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gemini_image_size - {st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size]}")

                                                st.pills(
                                                    "Image aspect ratio",
                                                    key=key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input,
                                                    options=GEMINI_ASPECT_RATIO_LIST,
                                                    default=st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio],
                                                    selection_mode="single",
                                                    on_change=on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio
                                                )

                                                if not in_current_model.startswith('gemini-2.5'):
                                                    st.radio(
                                                        "Image resolution",
                                                        options=GEMINI_IMAGE_SIZE_LIST,
                                                        key=key_gemini_image_size_input,
                                                        horizontal=True,
                                                        index=GEMINI_IMAGE_SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size]),
                                                        on_change=on_change_gemini_image_size
                                                    )


                else:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        st.markdown("Disable input")

            in_allow_enable_file_search = current_model_config.get(
                "file_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("file_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_code_interpreter = current_model_config.get(
                "code_interpreter") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("code_interpreter") else False
            in_enable_reasoning_effort = current_model_config.get(
                "reasoning") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("reasoning") else False
            in_allow_enable_image_output = current_model_config.get(
                "image_generation") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("image_generation") else False
            in_allow_enable_web_search = current_model_config.get(
                "web_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("web_search") else False
            in_allow_enable_service_tier = True if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("service_tier",[]) else False
            in_allow_enable_google_search = current_model_config.get("google_search") if current_model_config and current_model_config.get("google_search") else False

            adv_setting_input_handler(
                allow_enable_file_search=in_allow_enable_file_search,
                allow_enable_code_interpreter=in_allow_enable_code_interpreter,
                enable_reasoning_effort=in_enable_reasoning_effort,
                allow_enable_image_output=in_allow_enable_image_output,
                allow_enable_web_search=in_allow_enable_web_search,
                allow_enable_service_tier=in_allow_enable_service_tier,
                allow_enable_google_search=in_allow_enable_google_search
            )

def model_input_handler():
                if PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = chatbot_models_config[0]

                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=chatbot_models_config,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    # captions=[entry["caption"] for entry in chatbot_models_config],
                    format_func=lambda option: option["model_short_name"],
                    index=chatbot_models_config.index(st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    # reset service tier
                    st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = None

                    st.rerun()

def adv_setting_input_handler(
                    allow_enable_file_search: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_code_interpreter: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_image_output: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_web_search: bool = False,
                    enable_reasoning_effort: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_service_tier: bool = False,
                    allow_enable_google_search: bool = False,
                    in_current_model: str = current_model
            ):
                if not st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        # model setting
                        if (allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list) or enable_reasoning_effort:
                            with st.expander("Model setting", expanded=True, icon='⚙️'):
                                if allow_enable_service_tier and current_service_tier_list:
                                    if PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY not in st.session_state or st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] is None:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = current_service_tier_list[0]

                                    def on_change_service_tier_radio():
                                        if st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                            st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                            print(f"on_change_service_tier - {st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]}")

                                    st.radio(
                                        "Service tier",
                                        options=current_service_tier_list,
                                        key=PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                        horizontal=True,
                                        index=current_service_tier_list.index(st.session_state[PAGE_SERVICE_TIER_ST_KEY]),
                                        on_change=on_change_service_tier_radio,
                                        help="For faster processing, try the priority processing service tier. For lower prices with higher latency, try the flex processing tier."
                                    )

                                if enable_reasoning_effort:
                                    if PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                                        st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = REASONING_EFFORT_LIST[1]

                                    def on_change_reasoning_effort():
                                        if st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                                            st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                                            print(f"on_change_reasoning_effort - {st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]}")

                                    st.radio(
                                        "Reasoning effort",
                                        options=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST,
                                        key=PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_INPUT_ST_KEY,
                                        horizontal=True,
                                        disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                                        index=REASONING_EFFORT_LIST.index(st.session_state[PAGE_REASONING_EFFORT_ST_KEY]),
                                        on_change=on_change_reasoning_effort,
                                        help="Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models. Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response."
                                    )

                        # tools
                        with st.expander("Tools", expanded=True, icon='🛠️'):
                            if allow_enable_file_search:
                                def on_change_enable_file_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_file_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable file search",
                                    key=key_enable_file_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_file_search_toggle,
                                    help="Enables models to retrieve information in a knowledge base of previously uploaded files through semantic and keyword search"
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_file_search_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.vector_store_files_management()
                                    except Exception as vector_store_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_code_interpreter:
                                def on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable code interpreter",
                                    key=key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_code_interpreter_toggle,
                                    help="**Code execution:** Runs Python code to perform various computations and tasks.  \n**Data visualization:** Creates visualizations like graphs and charts directly from data to help users understand patterns and trends.  \n**File processing:** Reads and generates files, including images and data files, making it versatile for different data types."
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_code_interpreter_toggle] and chat_client:
                                    try:
                                        chat_client.container_files_management()
                                    except Exception as container_files_management_error:
                                        print(traceback.format_exc())

                            if allow_enable_web_search:
                                def on_change_enable_web_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_web_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable web search",
                                    key=key_enable_web_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_web_search_toggle
                                )
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle]:
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        def on_change_allowed_domains_text_area():
                                            if st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] != st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]:
                                                st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains] = st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains_input]
                                                print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_allowed_domains_text_area - {st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains]}")

                                        st.text_area(
                                            "Search only in these websites :blue-background[Optional]",
                                            height="content",
                                            value=st.session_state[key_web_search_allowed_domains],
                                            key=key_web_search_allowed_domains_input,
                                            placeholder="e.g. en.wikipedia.org,arxiv.org",
                                            on_change=on_change_allowed_domains_text_area
                                        )
                                        st.caption(
                                            'Enter domains or subdomains like "example.com" or "blog.example.com". Full paths like "example.com/path" are not supported.')
                            # else:
                            #     st.session_state[key_enable_web_search_toggle] = False

                            if allow_enable_google_search:
                                def on_change_enable_google_search_toggle():
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_google_search_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle]}")

                                st.toggle(
                                    "Enable google search",
                                    key=key_enable_google_search_toggle_input,
                                    value=st.session_state[key_enable_google_search_toggle],
                                    on_change=on_change_enable_google_search_toggle,
                                    help="Grounding with Google Search connects the model with world knowledge, a wide possible range of topics, or up-to-date information on the internet."
                                )


                            if allow_enable_image_output:
                                def on_change_enable_image_toggle():
                                    # print(f"st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")
                                    if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] != st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]:
                                        st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle_input]
                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_enable_image_toggle - {st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]}")

                                # strictly enable image output when function group is 'Image Creator'
                                disable_toggle_image = False
                                if 'Image Creator' in PAGE_FUNCTION_GROUP:
                                    st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle] = True
                                    disable_toggle_image = True

                                if not disable_toggle_image:
                                    st.toggle(
                                        "Enable image output",
                                        key=key_enable_image_toggle_input,
                                        value=st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle],
                                        on_change=on_change_enable_image_toggle,
                                        disabled=disable_toggle_image
                                    )
                                # adv setting for image generation
                                if st.session_state[key_enable_image_toggle]:
                                    # image_setting_cols = st.columns([1,15])
                                    with st.container(border=True):
                                        match in_current_model:
                                            # gpt image config
                                            case in_current_model if in_current_model.startswith('gpt'):
                                                def on_change_gpt_image_size_radio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size] != st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size] = st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gpt_image_size_radio - {st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size]}")

                                                def on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality] != st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality] = st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio - {st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality]}")

                                                st.radio(
                                                    "Image size",
                                                    options=SIZE_LIST,
                                                    key=key_gpt_image_size_input,
                                                    horizontal=True,
                                                    index=SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gpt_image_size]),
                                                    on_change=on_change_gpt_image_size_radio
                                                )

                                                st.radio(
                                                    "Image quality",
                                                    options=QUALITY_LIST,
                                                    key=key_gpt_image_quality_input,
                                                    horizontal=True,
                                                    index=QUALITY_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gpt_image_quality]),
                                                    on_change=on_change_gpt_image_quality_radio
                                                )
                                            # gemini image config
                                            case in_current_model if in_current_model.startswith('gemini'):
                                                def on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio] != st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio] = st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio - {st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio]}")

                                                def on_change_gemini_image_size():
                                                    if st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size] != st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size_input]:
                                                        st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size] = st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size_input]
                                                        print(f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING} on_change_gemini_image_size - {st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size]}")

                                                st.pills(
                                                    "Image aspect ratio",
                                                    key=key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio_input,
                                                    options=GEMINI_ASPECT_RATIO_LIST,
                                                    default=st.session_state[key_gemini_image_aspect_ratio],
                                                    selection_mode="single",
                                                    on_change=on_change_gemini_image_aspect_ratio
                                                )

                                                if not in_current_model.startswith('gemini-2.5'):
                                                    st.radio(
                                                        "Image resolution",
                                                        options=GEMINI_IMAGE_SIZE_LIST,
                                                        key=key_gemini_image_size_input,
                                                        horizontal=True,
                                                        index=GEMINI_IMAGE_SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[key_gemini_image_size]),
                                                        on_change=on_change_gemini_image_size
                                                    )


                else:
                    with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                        st.markdown("Disable input")

def chat_input_container_handler():
    empty_chat_input_container.empty()
    # create new key for disabled streamlit component
    key_chat_input = f'{PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_CHAT_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_size_input = f'{PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_quality_input = f'{PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_INPUT_ST_KEY
    key_model_input = f'{PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY}_disable' if st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY] else PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY

    with empty_chat_input_container.container(border=False):
        chat_input_cols = st.columns([2,6,1], vertical_alignment="bottom")
        with chat_input_cols[0]:
            @st.fragment
            def image_model_input_handler():
                image_models = [
                    {"model": "gemini-2.5-flash-image-preview", "label": "nano-banana"},
                    {"model": "gpt-4.1", "label": "GPT Image"},
                ]
                if PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = image_models[0]
                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=image_models,
                    key=key_model_input,
                    format_func=lambda option: option["label"],
                    index=[m for m in image_models].index(st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY]),
                    disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                    label_visibility="collapsed"
                )
                if st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                    st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_MODEL_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                    st.rerun()

            image_model_input_handler()

        with chat_input_cols[2]:
            # with st.popover("☰"):

            def image_setting_input_handler():
                with st.popover("☰", disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]):
                    if PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                        st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_ST_KEY] = SIZE_LIST[0]
                    if PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_ST_KEY not in st.session_state:
                        st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_ST_KEY] = QUALITY_LIST[0]
                    st.radio(
                        "Size",
                        options=SIZE_LIST,
                        key=key_size_input,
                        horizontal=True,
                        disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                        index=SIZE_LIST.index(st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_ST_KEY])
                    )
                    if st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                        st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_SIZE_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                        st.rerun()

                    st.radio(
                        "Quality",
                        options=QUALITY_LIST,
                        key=key_quality_input,
                        horizontal=True,
                        index=QUALITY_LIST.index(st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_ST_KEY]),
                        disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY]
                    )
                    if st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_ST_KEY] != st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_INPUT_ST_KEY]:
                        st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_ST_KEY] = st.session_state[PAGE_IMAGE_QUALITY_INPUT_ST_KEY]
                        st.rerun()

            image_setting_input_handler()

        with chat_input_cols[1]:
            chat_input_placeholder = "Your prompt and/or attach image(s)"
            accept_file_type = IMAGE_EDIT_FILES_TYPE
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=chat_input_placeholder,
                disabled=st.session_state[PAGE_INPUT_DISABLE_ST_KEY],
                key=key_chat_input,
                accept_file="multiple" if accept_file_type else False,
                file_type=accept_file_type
            )

def custom_bot_create_thread_if_empty():
    auth.initUserState(redirect_url_path=custom_bot_redirect_url)
    
    # 检查是否是 Dify 类型的助手
    if custom_bot_chat and custom_bot_chat.agent_type == 'dify':
        # 对于 Dify，我们使用 conversation_id 而不是 thread_id
        conversation_id_key = 'dify_conversation_id_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID
        thread_id_key = 'thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID
        
        # 如果不存在 conversation_id，我们创建一个新的会话
        if conversation_id_key not in st.session_state or not st.session_state[conversation_id_key]:
            # 初始化 Dify 客户端
            if 'custom_bot_dify_client' not in st.session_state or st.session_state.custom_bot_dify_client is None:
                dify_api_key = custom_bot_chat.openai_api_key  # 使用 openai_api_key 字段保存 Dify API 密钥
                st.session_state.custom_bot_dify_client = DifyClient(
                    api_key=dify_api_key,
                    user_id=st.session_state.userId,
                    user_name=st.session_state.userName,
                    user_email=st.session_state.userEmail if hasattr(st.session_state, 'userEmail') else None
                )
            
            # 创建新的 Dify 会话
            dify_client = st.session_state.custom_bot_dify_client
            conversation_id = dify_client.create_conversation()
            print(f"{datetime.utcnow()} Dify Conversation Created -> conversation_id: {conversation_id}")
            StLogging_custom_bot.append_log(log_text=f"Dify Conversation Created -> conversation_id: {conversation_id}")
            
            # 存储会话 ID
            st.session_state[conversation_id_key] = conversation_id
            dify_client.conversation_id = conversation_id
            
            # 为了兼容性，我们也设置 thread_id
            thread_id = f"dify_{uuid.uuid4()}"
            st.session_state[thread_id_key] = thread_id
            
            # 创建并存储聊天线程记录
            insert_user_thread(thread_id, datetime.now(), "Active", st.session_state.userId, st.session_state.userName, st.session_state.client_assistantID, "Custom Bot")
            created_chat_thread = ChatThread(
                thread_id=thread_id,
                assistant_id=st.session_state.client_assistantID,
                user_id=st.session_state.userId,
                thread_name=None,
                thread_created_at=datetime.now()
            )
            
            print(f"{datetime.utcnow()} Insert created thread into DB -> thread_id: {thread_id}")
            StLogging_custom_bot.append_log(log_text=f"Insert created thread into DB -> thread_id: {thread_id}")
            
            # 初始化消息历史
            if 'messages_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID not in st.session_state:
                st.session_state['messages_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = []
            
            # 初始化线程缓存
            if 'custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID not in st.session_state:
                st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = {}
                
            if st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID]:
                updated_dict = {created_chat_thread.thread_id:created_chat_thread}
                current_dict = st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID]
                st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = {**updated_dict, **current_dict}
            else:
                st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = {created_chat_thread.thread_id: created_chat_thread}
    else:
        # OpenAI 逻辑保持不变
        if st.session_state['thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] == "" or st.session_state['thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] == "-":
            # 创建新对话线程，并插入数据库记录
            thread_created = custom_bot_openai_client.create_thread_with_assistant_message()
            print(f"{datetime.utcnow()} Openai Thread Created -> thread_id: {thread_created.id}")
            StLogging_custom_bot.append_log(log_text=f"Openai Thread Created -> thread_id: {thread_created.id}")

            insert_user_thread(thread_created.id, datetime.utcfromtimestamp(thread_created.created_at), "Active", st.session_state.userId, st.session_state.userName, st.session_state.client_assistantID, "Custom Bot")
            created_chat_thread = ChatThread(
                thread_id=thread_created.id,
                assistant_id=st.session_state.client_assistantID,
                user_id=st.session_state.userId,
                thread_name=None,
                thread_created_at=datetime.utcfromtimestamp(thread_created.created_at)
            )
            print(f"{datetime.utcnow()} Insert created thread into DB -> thread_id: {thread_created.id}")
            StLogging_custom_bot.append_log(log_text=f"Insert created thread into DB -> thread_id: {thread_created.id}")
            st.session_state['thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = thread_created.id
            if st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID]:
                updated_dict = {created_chat_thread.thread_id:created_chat_thread}
                current_dict = st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID]
                st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = {**updated_dict, **current_dict}
            else:
                st.session_state['custom_bot_cache_user_thread_dic_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = {created_chat_thread.thread_id: created_chat_thread}

app/backend/st_pages/5_💡_LF_Custom_Bots..source_code:
def custom_bot_run_streaming_dify(prompt, files=None):
    """
    实时获取 Dify 的响应，使用 create_run_stream 函数实现
    
    Args:
        prompt: 用户输入的文本
        files: 用户上传的文件列表，每个文件是包含id、type等信息的字典
    """
    try:
        # 准备消息内容，包括文本和文件
        message_content = [{"type": "text", "text": prompt}]
        
        # 如果有文件，添加到消息内容中
        if files and len(files) > 0:
            for file in files:
                file_id = file.get("id")
                if not file_id:
                    continue
                    
                file_type = file.get("type")
                if file_type == "image":
                    message_content.append({"type": "image_file", "image_file": {"file_id": file_id, "detail": "high"}})
                else:
                    message_content.append({"type": "file", "file": {"file_id": file_id}})
        
        # 获取当前的会话 ID
        conversation_id_key = 'dify_conversation_id_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID
        thread_id = st.session_state.get(conversation_id_key) or f"thread_{int(time.time())}"
        
        print(f"2025-05-23 {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S.%f')} Dify Conversation Created -> conversation_id: {thread_id}")
        
        # 使用 create_run_stream 函数处理消息
        try:
            # 执行流式对话
            run_stream = create_run_stream(
                thread_id=thread_id,
                api_key=custom_bot_chat.openai_api_key,
                custombot_chat=custom_bot_chat,
                additional_messages=[{"role": "user", "content": message_content}],
                user_id=st.session_state.userId,
                user_name=st.session_state.userName,
                user_email=st.session_state.userEmail if hasattr(st.session_state, 'userEmail') else None
            )
            
            print(f"2025-05-23 {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S.%f')} Insert created thread into DB -> thread_id: {run_stream.thread_id if hasattr(run_stream, 'thread_id') else 'unknown'}")
            
            # 将消息添加到会话历史
            if run_stream.chat_messages and len(run_stream.chat_messages) > 0:
                st.session_state["messages_" + st.session_state.client_assistantID].extend(run_stream.chat_messages)
            
            # 如果获取到了新的会话 ID，保存它
            if hasattr(st.session_state, 'custom_bot_dify_client') and st.session_state.custom_bot_dify_client.conversation_id:
                st.session_state[conversation_id_key] = st.session_state.custom_bot_dify_client.conversation_id
            
            return True
            
        except Exception as e:
            # 捕获 Dify 流式处理异常
            with st.chat_message("assistant"):
                error_message = "很抱歉，连接服务器时出现问题。这可能是由于网络问题或服务器负载过高。请稍后再试。"
                st.markdown(error_message)
                
                # 将错误消息添加到会话历史
                st.session_state['messages_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID].append({
                    "role": "assistant",
                    "content": [{"type": "text", "text": error_message}]
                })
                
                print(f"Dify流式处理异常: {str(e)}")
                print(traceback.format_exc())
            
            return False
    
    except Exception as error:
        # 捕获外部异常
        print(traceback.format_exc())
        with st.chat_message("assistant"):
            error_message = f"很抱歉，发生了意外错误: {str(error)}"
            st.error(error_message)
            
            # 将错误消息添加到会话历史
            st.session_state['messages_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID].append({
                "role": "assistant",
                "content": [{"type": "text", "text": error_message}]
            })
            
        return False

def custom_bot_run_streaming_n8n(prompt, files=None):
    """
    处理N8n类型的assistant的流式响应
    
    Args:
        prompt: 用户输入的文本
        files: 文件列表（N8n暂不支持文件上传）
    """
    # 获取当前assistant的配置
    custom_bot_chat = st.session_state.custom_bot_user_chat_access_dict[st.session_state.client_assistantID]
    
    # 获取或创建thread_id
    thread_id = st.session_state.get('thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID)
    if not thread_id:
        thread_id = f"thread_{uuid.uuid4()}"
        st.session_state['thread_' + st.session_state.client_assistantID] = thread_id
    
    # 准备消息内容
    message_content = [{"type": "text", "text": prompt}]
    
    # 日志和打点
    auth.logging('LF Custom Bots', custom_bot_chat.assistant_name, prompt, str(st.session_state.client_assistantID))
    
    StLogging_custom_bot.append_log(log_text=f"Run N8n Streaming Start")
    
    # 使用 create_n8n_run_stream 函数处理消息
    try:
        # 执行流式对话
        run_stream = create_n8n_run_stream(
            thread_id=thread_id,
            webhook_path=custom_bot_chat.openai_api_key,  # 使用 openai_api_key 字段保存的 webhook path
            custombot_chat=custom_bot_chat,
            additional_messages=[{"role": "user", "content": message_content}],
            user_id=st.session_state.userId,
            user_name=st.session_state.userName,
            user_email=st.session_state.userEmail if hasattr(st.session_state, 'userEmail') else None,
            assistant_id=st.session_state.client_assistantID
        )
        
        print(f"2025-05-23 {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S.%f')} N8n run stream completed -> thread_id: {thread_id}")
        
        # 将消息添加到会话历史
        if run_stream.chat_messages and len(run_stream.chat_messages) > 0:
            st.session_state["messages_" + st.session_state.client_assistantID].extend(run_stream.chat_messages)
        
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error in N8n run stream: {str(e)}")
        with st.chat_message("assistant"):
            st.error(f"Failed to get response from N8n: {str(e)}")
        return False

def assistant_name_input_handler():
        try:
            openai_client: OpenaiClientAssistant = st.session_state.custom_bot_creator_openai_client

            # 检查是否是POC bot
            is_poc_bot = st.session_state.get('is_poc_bot', False)
            if is_poc_bot:
                st.warning(
                    f"⚠️ This bot was created in POC mode and doesn't exist in OpenAI. "
                    f"Bot settings cannot be modified on this page. "
                    f"Please use the **POC Config Custombot** page to manage this bot's configuration."
                )

            st.text_input("Name", key='assistant_name_input', disabled=is_poc_bot)

            if not is_poc_bot and st.session_state.assistant_name_input != st.session_state.assistant_name:
                assistant_updated = openai_client.update_assistant_name(st.session_state.assistant_name_input)
                st.session_state.assistant_name = st.session_state.assistant_name_input
                update_assistant_name_with_assistant_id(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id, assistant_updated.name,
                                                        st.session_state.userName,
                                                        st.session_state.userId)
                # 直接更新缓存中的对象
                safe_cache_update(
                    handle_assistant_name_update,
                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                    assistant_updated.name
                )
        except NotFoundError as e:
            # 404错误：首次检测到POC bot
            print(f"[INFO] Assistant {st.session_state.selected_assistant_id} not found in OpenAI (POC-created bot)")
            st.session_state.is_poc_bot = True
            st.warning(
                f"⚠️ This bot was created in POC mode and doesn't exist in OpenAI. "
                f"Bot settings cannot be modified on this page. "
                f"Please use the **POC Config Custombot** page to manage this bot's configuration."
            )
            st.rerun()  # 重新运行以禁用输入框
        except Exception as error:
            st.error(error)
            print(traceback.format_exc())

def assistant_temperature_input_handler():
        try:
            openai_client: OpenaiClientAssistant = st.session_state.custom_bot_creator_openai_client

            # 检查是否是POC bot
            is_poc_bot = st.session_state.get('is_poc_bot', False)

            st.slider(
                label='Temperature',
                min_value=float(0),
                max_value=float(2.00),
                step=0.1,
                key='assistant_temperature_input',
                disabled=is_poc_bot,
                help='What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2, defaults to 1. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.'
            )

            if not is_poc_bot and st.session_state.assistant_temperature_input != st.session_state.assistant_temperature:
                assistant_updated = openai_client.update_assistant_temperature(
                    st.session_state.assistant_temperature_input)
                st.session_state.assistant_temperature = st.session_state.assistant_temperature_input
                update_assistant_temperature_with_assistant_id(
                    assistant_id=st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                    assistant_temperature=float(assistant_updated.temperature),
                    Update_BY=st.session_state.userName,
                    Update_BY_Id=st.session_state.userId
                )
        except NotFoundError as e:
            # 404错误：首次检测到POC bot
            print(f"[INFO] Assistant {st.session_state.selected_assistant_id} not found in OpenAI (POC-created bot)")
            st.session_state.is_poc_bot = True
            st.rerun()
        except Exception as error:
            st.error(error)
            print(traceback.format_exc())
