                                    "Sync_Folder_Id": str(sync_folder.folder_id),
                                    "Selected": False,
                                    "Recursive Sync": sync_folder.recursive_sync,
                                    "Folder URL": sync_folder.folder_url,
                                    "Sync Status": sync_folder.sync_status,
                                    "Progress": sync_folder_progress,
                                    "Progress Detail": f"{full_success_count} / {full_total_count}",
                                    "Sync On": auth.localize_datetime(sync_folder.sync_timestamp)
                                }
                                sync_folders_data.append(sync_folder_data)

                            # empty_edited_df_sf = st.empty()
                            if "df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folders_data" not in st.session_state:
                                st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folders_data"] = 0
                            key_edited_df_sf = "data_editor_assistant_sync_folder_overview" + str(
                                st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folders_data"])
                            edited_df_sf = st.data_editor(
                                sync_folders_data,
                                use_container_width=True,
                                num_rows="fixed",
                                disabled=("Folder URL", "Sync Status", "Sync On", "Progress Detail"),
                                column_config={
                                    "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                    "Recursive Sync": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                    # "Folder URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                    #     display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/sites/(.*)"),
                                    "Folder URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                        display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/(?:sites|personal)/(.*)"),
                                    "Sync Status": st.column_config.Column(width="small"),
                                    "Progress": st.column_config.ProgressColumn(min_value=0, max_value=100),
                                    "Progress Detail": st.column_config.Column(width="small")
                                },
                                column_order=(
                                "Selected", "Recursive Sync", "Folder URL", "Sync Status", "Progress", "Progress Detail",
                                "Sync On"),
                                key=key_edited_df_sf
                            )
                            # edited_df_sf Recursive Sync
                            changed_sync_folder_id, changed_recursive_sync_value = st_data_editor_column_value_on_change(
                                in_data=sync_folders_data,
                                key_st_data_editor=key_edited_df_sf,
                                column_name_of_changed_value="Recursive Sync",
                                id_column_name="Sync_Folder_Id"
                            )
                            if changed_sync_folder_id:
                                st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folders_data"] += 1
                                try:
                                    changed_sync_folder = [sf for sf in custom_bot_selected.sync_folders if
                                                        sf.folder_id == changed_sync_folder_id][0]
                                    update_assistant_sync_folder_recursive_sync(
                                        folder_id=changed_sync_folder.folder_id,
                                        recursive_sync=changed_recursive_sync_value
                                    )
                                    changed_sync_folder.recursive_sync = changed_recursive_sync_value
                                except Exception as error:
                                    print(error)
                                finally:
                                    # empty_edited_df_sf.empty()
                                    st_delete_session_state_by_key(key_edited_df_sf)
                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                            # edited_df_sf selected action
                            selected_sync_folder_ids: list[str] = [df_sf["Sync_Folder_Id"] for df_sf in edited_df_sf if
                                                                df_sf["Selected"]]
                            selected_sync_folders = [sf for sf in custom_bot_selected.sync_folders if
                                                    sf.folder_id in selected_sync_folder_ids]
                            if selected_sync_folder_ids:
                                selected_sync_folder_container = empty_selected_sync_folder_container.container()
                                with selected_sync_folder_container:
                                    print(f"Assistant select sync folder -> {selected_sync_folders}")
                                    selected_item_action_cols = st.columns([1, 3, 1])
                                    with selected_item_action_cols[0]:
                                        st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_sync_folder_ids)} folder(s).")
                                    if selected_item_action_cols[1].button("Delete selected folders and files",
                                                                        key="btn_assistant_delete_selected_sync_folders",
                                                                        use_container_width=False, type="primary"):
                                        for sync_folder_tobe_deleted in selected_sync_folders:
                                            assistant_sync_folder_files: [
                                                File] = custom_bot_selected.get_assistant_files_by_folder(
                                                sync_folder_id=sync_folder_tobe_deleted.folder_id)
                                            exception_str = ""
                                            print(assistant_sync_folder_files)
                                            for assistant_file_tobe_deleted in assistant_sync_folder_files:
                                                try:
                                                    delete_google_file_search_document_if_needed(assistant_file_tobe_deleted)
                                                    openai_client.client_delete_file(
                                                        file_id=assistant_file_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                    delete_file(file_id=assistant_file_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                except Exception:
                                                    exception_str = exception_str + "  \n" + f"Delete assistant sync folder file failed -> {assistant_file_tobe_deleted.file_id}"
                                                    print(
                                                        f"Delete assistant sync folder file failed -> {assistant_file_tobe_deleted.file_id}")
                                            if exception_str == "":
                                                delete_assistant_sync_folder_by_id(sync_folder_tobe_deleted.folder_id)
                                                custom_bot_selected.sync_folders.remove(sync_folder_tobe_deleted)
                                        custom_bot_selected.sync_folders = None
                                        custom_bot_selected.vector_store_files_ids = None
                                        custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions = None
                                        custom_bot_selected.clear_assistant_files()
                                        st.rerun()
                            else:
                                empty_selected_sync_folder_container.empty()

                            sync_folder_tabs = st.tabs(["Sync Folder Details", "Sync File Details"])
                            with sync_folder_tabs[0]:
                                if custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions:
                                    empty_selected_sync_folder_transactions_container = st.empty()
                                    sync_folder_transactions_data = []
                                    for sync_folder_transaction_index, sync_folder_transaction in enumerate(
                                            custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions):
                                        sync_folder_transaction_data = {
                                            "Sync_Folder_Transaction_Id": sync_folder_transaction.folder_transaction_id,
                                            "Selected": False,
                                            "Folder Name": sync_folder_transaction.folder_name,
                                            "Folder URL": sync_folder_transaction.folder_url,
                                            "Sync Status": sync_folder_transaction.sync_status,
                                            "Sync On": auth.localize_datetime(sync_folder_transaction.sync_timestamp),
                                            "Total Count": sync_folder_transaction.sync_total_count,
                                            "Success Count": sync_folder_transaction.sync_success_count,
                                            "Sync Log": sync_folder_transaction.sync_log
                                        }
                                        sync_folder_transactions_data.append(sync_folder_transaction_data)

                                    key_edited_df_sft = "data_editor_assistant_sync_folder_transaction"
                                    edited_df_sft = st.data_editor(
                                        sync_folder_transactions_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=("Folder Name", "Folder URL", "Sync Status", "Sync On", "Total Count",
                                                "Success Count", "Sync Log"),
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            # "Folder URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                            #     display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/sites/(.*)"),
                                            "Folder URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                                display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/(?:sites|personal)/(.*)"),
                                            "Total Count": st.column_config.Column(width="small"),
                                            "Success Count": st.column_config.Column(width="small"),
                                            "Sync Log": st.column_config.Column(width="medium")
                                        },
                                        key=key_edited_df_sft,
                                        column_order=(
                                        "Selected", "Folder Name", "Folder URL", "Sync Status", "Sync On", "Total Count",
                                        "Success Count", "Sync Log")
                                    )

                                    # select sync folder transaction
                                    selected_sync_folder_transaction_ids: list[str] = [df_sft["Sync_Folder_Transaction_Id"]
                                                                                    for df_sft in edited_df_sft if
                                                                                    df_sft["Selected"]]
                                    if selected_sync_folder_transaction_ids:
                                        selected_sync_folder_transactions = [sft for sft in
                                                                            custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions if
                                                                            sft.folder_transaction_id in selected_sync_folder_transaction_ids]
                                        selected_sync_folder_transactions_container = empty_selected_sync_folder_transactions_container.container()
                                        with selected_sync_folder_transactions_container:
                                            print(
                                                f"Assistant select sync folder transactions -> {selected_sync_folder_transaction_ids}")
                                            selected_sft_item_action_cols = st.columns([1, 3, 1])
                                            with selected_sft_item_action_cols[0]:
                                                st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_sync_folder_transaction_ids)} folder(s).")
                                            with selected_sft_item_action_cols[1]:
                                                if st.button("Delete selected folder and files",
                                                            key="btn_assistant_selected_sync_folder_transactions_delete",
                                                            use_container_width=True, type="primary"):
                                                    print(
                                                        f"Delete selected sync folder transactions - {selected_sync_folder_transactions}")
                                                    for sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted in selected_sync_folder_transactions:
                                                        sync_folder_transaction_files_delete_error_msg = ""
                                                        if sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted.folder_unique_id:
                                                            sync_folder_transaction_files_tobe_deleted = [sftf for sftf in
                                                                                                        custom_bot_selected.assistant_files
                                                                                                        if
                                                                                                        sftf.folder_unique_id == sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted.folder_unique_id]
                                                            for sftf_tobe_deleted in sync_folder_transaction_files_tobe_deleted:
                                                                try:
                                                                    delete_google_file_search_document_if_needed(sftf_tobe_deleted)
                                                                    openai_client.client_delete_file(
                                                                        file_id=sftf_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                                    delete_file(
                                                                        file_id=sftf_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                                    if custom_bot_selected.assistant_files and sftf_tobe_deleted in custom_bot_selected.assistant_files:
                                                                        custom_bot_selected.assistant_files.remove(
                                                                            sftf_tobe_deleted)
                                                                except Exception:
                                                                    sync_folder_transaction_files_delete_error_msg = f"Delete selected assistant sync file failed -> {sftf_tobe_deleted.file_id}"
                                                                    print(
                                                                        f"Delete selected assistant sync file failed -> {sftf_tobe_deleted.file_id}")
                                                        if not sync_folder_transaction_files_delete_error_msg:
                                                            delete_assistant_sync_folder_transaction_by_id(
                                                                folder_transaction_id=sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted.folder_transaction_id)
                                                            if custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions and sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted in custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions:
                                                                custom_bot_selected.sync_folder_transactions.remove(
                                                                    sync_folder_transaction_tobe_deleted)
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                    else:
                                        empty_selected_sync_folder_transactions_container.empty()

                            with sync_folder_tabs[1]:
                                empty_selected_sync_folder_files_container = st.empty()

                                full_assistant_files = custom_bot_selected.get_assistant_files()
                                sync_folder_assistant_files = [af for af in full_assistant_files if af.folder_id]
                                if sync_folder_assistant_files:
                                    sync_folder_files_data = []
                                    for sync_folder_assistant_file_index, sync_folder_assistant_file in enumerate(
                                            sync_folder_assistant_files):
                                        sync_file_value_enable_file_search = False
                                        file_search_type = get_current_file_search_type()
                                        if file_search_type == 'google':
                                            if sync_folder_assistant_file.destination == 'google_file_search_store':
                                                sync_file_value_enable_file_search = True
                                        elif file_search_type == 'pro':
                                            if sync_folder_assistant_file.destination == 'google_storage':
                                                sync_file_value_enable_file_search = True
                                        else:
                                            if custom_bot_selected.vector_store_files_ids and sync_folder_assistant_file.file_id in custom_bot_selected.vector_store_files_ids:
                                                sync_file_value_enable_file_search = True
                                        sync_folder_file_data = {
                                            "File_ID": sync_folder_assistant_file.file_id,
                                            "Selected": False,
                                            "File Name": sync_folder_assistant_file.file_name,
                                            "Enable File Search": sync_file_value_enable_file_search,
                                            "Last Modified On": auth.localize_datetime(
                                                sync_folder_assistant_file.file_time_last_modified),
                                            "File URL": sync_folder_assistant_file.file_url,
                                            "File Size (kb)": round(sync_folder_assistant_file.file_bytes / 1024, 2)
                                        }
                                        sync_folder_files_data.append(sync_folder_file_data)

                                    disable_checkbox_file_search = True
                                    if any(fs_tool in st.session_state.assistant_tools for fs_tool in ('file_search', 'file_search_pro', 'google_file_search')):
                                        disable_checkbox_file_search = False

                                    empty_edited_df_sff = st.empty()
                                    if "df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folder_files_data" not in st.session_state:
                                        st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folder_files_data"] = 0
                                    key_edited_df_sff = "data_editor_assistant_sync_folder_files" + str(
                                        st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folder_files_data"])
                                    edited_df_sff = empty_edited_df_sff.data_editor(
                                        sync_folder_files_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=("File Name", "Last Modified On", "File URL", "File Size (kb)"),
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "Enable File Search": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(
                                                disabled=disable_checkbox_file_search
                                            ),
                                            # "File URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                            #     display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/sites/(.*)")
                                            "File URL": st.column_config.LinkColumn(
                                                display_text=r"https://.*\.sharepoint\.com/(?:sites|personal)/(.*)")
                                        },
                                        column_order=(
                                            "Selected", "File Name", "Enable File Search", "Last Modified On", "File URL",
                                            "File Size (kb)"),
                                        key=key_edited_df_sff
                                    )
                                    selected_sync_file_ids: list[str] = [df_sff["File_ID"] for df_sff in edited_df_sff if
                                                                        df_sff["Selected"]]
                                    selected_sync_files = [sff for sff in sync_folder_assistant_files if
                                                        sff.file_id in selected_sync_file_ids]
                                    if selected_sync_file_ids:
                                        selected_sync_folder_files_container = empty_selected_sync_folder_files_container.container()
                                        with selected_sync_folder_files_container:
                                            print(f"Assistant select sync folder files -> {selected_sync_files}")
                                            selected_sff_item_action_cols = st.columns([1, 3, 1])
                                            with selected_sff_item_action_cols[0]:
                                                st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_sync_file_ids)} file(s).")
                                            with selected_sff_item_action_cols[1]:
                                                if st.button("Delete selected files",
                                                            key="btn_assistant_selected_sync_files_delete",
                                                            use_container_width=False, type="primary"):
                                                    print(f"Delete selected files - {selected_sync_files}")
                                                    for selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted in selected_sync_files:
                                                        try:
                                                            delete_google_file_search_document_if_needed(selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted)
                                                            openai_client.client_delete_file(
                                                                file_id=selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                            delete_file(file_id=selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted.file_id)
                                                            if custom_bot_selected.assistant_files and selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted in custom_bot_selected.assistant_files:
                                                                custom_bot_selected.assistant_files.remove(
                                                                    selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted)
                                                        except Exception:
                                                            print(
                                                                f"Delete selected assistant sync file failed -> {selected_sync_file_tobe_deleted.file_id}")
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                    else:
                                        empty_selected_sync_folder_files_container.empty()

                                    changed_sync_file_id, changed_sync_file_enable_file_search = st_data_editor_column_value_on_change(
                                        in_data=sync_folder_files_data,
                                        key_st_data_editor=key_edited_df_sff,
                                        column_name_of_changed_value="Enable File Search",
                                        id_column_name="File_ID"
                                    )
                                    if changed_sync_file_id:
                                        st.session_state["df_changed_count_assistant_sync_folder_files_data"] += 1
                                        try:
                                            on_change_assistant_file_enable_file_search(
                                                file_id=changed_sync_file_id,
                                                enable_file_search=changed_sync_file_enable_file_search
                                            )
                                        except Exception as error:
                                            print(error)
                                        finally:
                                            empty_edited_df_sff.empty()
                                            st_delete_session_state_by_key(key_edited_df_sff)
                                            st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                    with file_sync_tabs[1]:
                        if 'assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency' not in st.session_state:
                            st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency = None
                        trigger_cols = st.columns([2, 10])

                        def on_change_schedule_type():
                            st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_schedule_type = st.session_state.assistant_schedule_type_input
                            # custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency = []
                            st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency = []
                            st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency = None

                        schedule_type_options = ["Manually", "Daily", "Weekly", "Monthly"]
                        schedule_type = trigger_cols[0].radio(
                            "Trigger",
                            options=schedule_type_options,
                            key='assistant_schedule_type_input',
                            label_visibility="collapsed",
                            on_change=on_change_schedule_type,
                            index=schedule_type_options.index(
                                st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_schedule_type) if st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_schedule_type else 0
                        )
                        with trigger_cols[1]:
                            weekly_labels_dict = {
                                "1": "Mon",
                                "2": "Tue",
                                "3": "Wed",
                                "4": "Thu",
                                "5": "Fri",
                                "6": "Sat",
                                "7": "Sun"
                            }
                            match schedule_type:
                                # case None:
                                #     st.write("Manually trigger only")
                                case "Daily":
                                    st.write("Daily sync.")
                                case "Weekly":
                                    weekly_dict: dict[str, bool] = {}
                                    for weekly_key_number in range(1, 8):
                                        if st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency and (
                                                weekly_key_number in st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency):
                                            weekly_dict[str(weekly_key_number)] = True
                                        else:
                                            weekly_dict[str(weekly_key_number)] = False
                                    if not st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency:
                                        st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency = weekly_dict
                                    weekly_key_options = list(weekly_dict.keys())
                                    weekly_cols = st_column_groups(total_columns_count=len(weekly_key_options),
                                                                columns_number_per_group=7)

                                    def on_change_assistant_file_sync_weekly(dict_weekly_key: str, in_st_checkbox_key: str):
                                        weekly_dict_sync_frequency: dict[
                                            str, bool] = st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency
                                        weekly_dict_sync_frequency[dict_weekly_key] = st.session_state[in_st_checkbox_key]
                                        st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency = [int(p) for p in list(
                                            weekly_dict_sync_frequency.keys()) if weekly_dict_sync_frequency.get(p)]
                                        print(
                                            f"on_change_assistant_file_sync_weekly -> st_checkbox_key:{in_st_checkbox_key}, {st.session_state[in_st_checkbox_key]}, sync_frequency: {st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency}")

                                    for weekly_index, weekly_key in enumerate(weekly_key_options):
                                        st_checkbox_key = 'assistant_file_sync_trigger_weekly_' + str(weekly_index + 1)
                                        with weekly_cols[weekly_index]:
                                            st.checkbox(
                                                label=str(weekly_labels_dict.get(weekly_key)),
                                                key=st_checkbox_key,
                                                value=weekly_dict.get(weekly_key),
                                                on_change=on_change_assistant_file_sync_weekly,
                                                args=(weekly_key, st_checkbox_key)
                                            )
                                case "Monthly":
                                    monthly_dict: dict[str, bool] = {}
                                    for monthly_key_number in range(1, 32):
                                        if st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency and monthly_key_number in st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency:
                                            monthly_dict[str(monthly_key_number)] = True
                                        else:
                                            monthly_dict[str(monthly_key_number)] = False
                                    if not st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency:
                                        st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency = monthly_dict
                                    monthly_key_options = list(monthly_dict.keys())
                                    monthly_cols = st_column_groups(total_columns_count=len(monthly_key_options),
                                                                    columns_number_per_group=7)

                                    def on_change_assistant_file_sync_monthly(dict_monthly_key: str,
                                                                            in_st_checkbox_key: str):
                                        monthly_dict_sync_frequency: dict[
                                            str, bool] = st.session_state.assistant_file_dict_sync_frequency
                                        monthly_dict_sync_frequency[dict_monthly_key] = st.session_state[in_st_checkbox_key]
                                        st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency = [int(p) for p in list(
                                            monthly_dict_sync_frequency.keys()) if monthly_dict_sync_frequency.get(p)]
                                        print(
                                            f"on_change_assistant_file_sync_monthly -> st_checkbox_key:{in_st_checkbox_key}, {st.session_state[in_st_checkbox_key]}, sync_frequency: {st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency}")

                                    for monthly_index, monthly_key in enumerate(monthly_key_options):
                                        st_checkbox_key = 'assistant_file_sync_trigger_monthly_' + str(monthly_index + 1)
                                        with monthly_cols[monthly_index]:
                                            st.checkbox(
                                                label=str(monthly_key),
                                                key=st_checkbox_key,
                                                value=monthly_dict.get(monthly_key),
                                                on_change=on_change_assistant_file_sync_monthly,
                                                args=(monthly_key, st_checkbox_key)
                                            )
                        save_cols = st.columns([1, 1])
                        with save_cols[1]:
                            if st.button("Save", key='btn_assistant_file_sync_setting_save', use_container_width=True):
                                update_assistant_file_sync_setting_with_assistant_id(
                                    assistant_id=st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                    schedule_type=st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_schedule_type,
                                    sync_frequency=st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency,
                                    Update_BY=st.session_state.userName,
                                    Update_BY_Id=st.session_state.userId
                                )
                                custom_bot_selected.schedule_type = st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_schedule_type
                                custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency = st.session_state.assistant_file_sync_frequency
                        with save_cols[0]:
                            match custom_bot_selected.schedule_type:
                                case "Weekly":
                                    selected_weekly_label_list = [weekly_labels_dict[str(s)] for s in
                                                                custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency] if custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency else []
                                    text_sync_frequency = (' ' + ','.join(selected_weekly_label_list).strip(
                                        ',')) if selected_weekly_label_list else ''
                                case "Monthly":
                                    text_sync_frequency = (' ' + convert_sync_frequency_array_of_number_to_csv_str(
                                        custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency)) if custom_bot_selected.sync_frequency else ''
                                case _:
                                    text_sync_frequency = ''
                            st.write(f'Current setting: {custom_bot_selected.schedule_type}{text_sync_frequency}')

                    with file_sync_tabs[2]:
                        # if st.button("View video", key="assistant_file_sync_view_guide_video", use_container_width=False):
                        file_sync_guide_cols = st.columns([1, 2])
                        with file_sync_guide_cols[0]:
                            st.info(FILE_SYNC_GUIDELINE)
                        with file_sync_guide_cols[1]:
                            st.subheader("File Sync Guide")
                            video_content = streamlit_utils.load_video("./media/File_Sync_Guide.mp4")
                            st.video(video_content, format="video/mp4")

            except Exception as error_chat_access_control:
                st.error(error_chat_access_control)
                print(traceback.format_exc())

assistant_chat_access_control_input_handler
app/backend/st_pages/POC_Config_Custombo.source_code:
def assistant_chat_access_control_input_handler():
        try:
            streamlit_utils.write_text_using_html("Access Control")
            # chat_access_control_col1, chat_access_control_col2 = st.columns([2,1])
            # with chat_access_control_col1:
            st.radio(
                "Chat-only Access Control",
                access_control_list,
                captions=["Anyone with link can access", "Only people with access can open"],
                horizontal=True,
                # index=access_control_list.index(st.session_state.assistant_access_control),
                key="assistant_access_control_input",
                label_visibility="collapsed"
            )
            # print(st.session_state.assistant_access_control_input)
            if st.session_state.assistant_access_control_input != st.session_state.assistant_access_control:
                st.session_state.assistant_access_control = st.session_state.assistant_access_control_input
                update_assistant_chat_access_control_with_assistant_id(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                       st.session_state.assistant_access_control,
                                                                       st.session_state.userName,
                                                                       st.session_state.userId)
                # 访问权限更新需要重新加载缓存
                handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                custom_bot_selected.chat_access_control = st.session_state.assistant_access_control

        except Exception as error_chat_access_control:
            st.error(error_chat_access_control)
            print(traceback.format_exc())

app/backend/st_pages/POC_Config_Custombo.name: manage_user_access_section
app/backend/st_pages/POC_Config_Custombo.source_code:
def manage_user_access_section():
        streamlit_utils.write_text_using_html("")
        
        # 创建一个可点击的元素来切换用户访问管理部分的显示/隐藏状态
        if 'show_user_access_management' not in st.session_state:
            st.session_state.show_user_access_management = False
        
        # 定义切换显示状态的回调函数
        def toggle_user_access_management():
            st.session_state.show_user_access_management = not st.session_state.show_user_access_management
            
        st.button("Manage User Access", key="toggle_user_access_management", on_click=toggle_user_access_management)
            
        # 只有当状态为显示时才展示用户访问管理部分
        if st.session_state.show_user_access_management:
            try:
                # 获取用户访问列表
                if st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list == None:
                    st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id
                    )
                
                # 搜索用户和用户组部分
                # @st.fragment
                def search_and_add_users_fragment():
                    with st.expander("Search and Add Users/Groups", expanded=True):
                        # 创建选项卡来分别管理用户和用户组
                        search_tabs = st.tabs(["Users", "Groups"])
                        
                        # 用户搜索选项卡
                        with search_tabs[0]:
                            search_form = st.form(key="form_create_bot_search_user", clear_on_submit=False, border=False)
                            empty_search_form_warning = st.empty()
                            
                            form_search_col1, form_search_col2 = search_form.columns([1, 1])
                            with form_search_col1:
                                st.text_input("Search User", key='create_bot_search_user', label_visibility="collapsed")
                            with form_search_col2:
                                if search_form.form_submit_button("Search"):
                                    if len(st.session_state.create_bot_search_user) > 0:
                                        empty_search_form_warning.empty()
                                        output_json = auth.aad_search_user(st.session_state.create_bot_search_user)
                                        st.session_state.search_user_result_list = output_json["value"]
                                        if len(st.session_state.search_user_result_list) == 0:
                                            empty_search_form_warning.warning("No match result")
                                    else:
                                        empty_search_form_warning.warning("Please enter user name")
                                        st.session_state.search_user_result_list = []
                            
                            # 显示搜索结果
                            if len(st.session_state.search_user_result_list) > 0:
                                st.subheader("Search Result")
                                # 创建搜索结果数据
                                search_results_data = []
                                for user in st.session_state.search_user_result_list:
                                    if user["mail"] is None or user["id"] is None:
                                        continue
                                    
                                    # 检查用户是否已经存在
                                    user_exists = any(u['Access_By_Id'] == str(user["id"]) and u['Access_Type'] == 'user' for u in st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list)
                                    
                                    search_results_data.append({
                                        "User_ID": str(user["id"]),
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "User_Name": str(user["displayName"]),
                                        "User_Email": str(user["mail"]),
                                        "User_Permission": "Chat-only",
                                        "Exists": user_exists
                                    })
                                
                                if search_results_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示搜索结果
                                    search_key = f"search_results_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_search_results = st.data_editor(
                                        search_results_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["User_Name", "User_Email", "Exists"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "User_Name": "User Name",
                                            "User_Email": "User Email",
                                            "User_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "User Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            ),
                                            "Exists": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn("Already Added", disabled=True)
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "User_Name", "User_Email", "User_Permission", "Exists"),
                                        key=search_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理添加选中的用户
                                    selected_users = [user for user in edited_search_results if user["Selected"] and not user["Exists"]]
                                    if selected_users:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 5, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_users)} user(s) to add.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            add_button_key = f"add_selected_users_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Add Selected Users", key=add_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Adding users..."):
                                                        for user in selected_users:
                                                            if if_exist_assistant_access(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id, user["User_ID"], 'user'):
                                                                update_assistant_access_level(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    user["User_ID"],
                                                                    user["User_Permission"],
                                                                    'user'
                                                                )
                                                            else:
                                                                insert_assistants_access(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    user["User_Name"],
                                                                    user["User_ID"],
                                                                    user["User_Email"],
                                                                    user["User_Permission"],
                                                                    'user'
                                                                )
                                                        # 访问权限变更需要重新加载缓存
                                                        from utils.cache_update_helper import handle_assistant_access_update
                                                        handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully added {len(selected_users)} user(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error adding users: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                        
                        # 用户组搜索选项卡
                        with search_tabs[1]:
                            group_search_form = st.form(key="form_create_bot_search_group", clear_on_submit=False, border=False)
                            empty_group_search_form_warning = st.empty()
                            
                            group_form_search_col1, group_form_search_col2 = group_search_form.columns([1, 1])
                            with group_form_search_col1:
                                st.text_input("Search Group", key='create_bot_search_group', label_visibility="collapsed")
                            with group_form_search_col2:
                                if group_search_form.form_submit_button("Search"):
                                    if len(st.session_state.create_bot_search_group) > 0:
                                        empty_group_search_form_warning.empty()
                                        output_json = auth.aad_search_group(st.session_state.create_bot_search_group)
                                        st.session_state.search_group_result_list = output_json["value"]
                                        if len(st.session_state.search_group_result_list) == 0:
                                            empty_group_search_form_warning.warning("No match result")
                                    else:
                                        empty_group_search_form_warning.warning("Please enter group name")
                                        st.session_state.search_group_result_list = []
                            
                            # 显示用户组搜索结果
                            if 'search_group_result_list' in st.session_state and len(st.session_state.search_group_result_list) > 0:
                                st.subheader("Search Result")
                                # 创建用户组搜索结果数据
                                group_search_results_data = []
                                for group in st.session_state.search_group_result_list:
                                    if group["id"] is None:
                                        continue
                                    
                                    # 检查用户组是否已经存在
                                    group_exists = any(g['Access_By_Id'] == str(group["id"]) and g['Access_Type'] == 'group' for g in st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list)
                                    
                                    group_search_results_data.append({
                                        "Group_ID": str(group["id"]),
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "Group_Name": str(group["displayName"]),
                                        "Group_Mail": str(group.get("mail", "")),
                                        "Group_Permission": "Chat-only",
                                        "Exists": group_exists
                                    })
                                
                                if group_search_results_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户组搜索结果
                                    group_search_key = f"group_search_results_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_group_search_results = st.data_editor(
                                        group_search_results_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["Group_Name", "Group_Mail", "Exists"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "Group_Name": "Group Name",
                                            "Group_Mail": "Group Email",
                                            "Group_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "Group Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            ),
                                            "Exists": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn("Already Added", disabled=True)
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "Group_Name", "Group_Mail", "Group_Permission", "Exists"),
                                        key=group_search_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理添加选中的用户组
                                    selected_groups = [group for group in edited_group_search_results if group["Selected"] and not group["Exists"]]
                                    if selected_groups:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 4, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_groups)} group(s) to add.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            add_group_button_key = f"add_selected_groups_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Add Selected Groups", key=add_group_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Adding groups..."):
                                                        for group in selected_groups:
                                                            if if_exist_assistant_access(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id, group["Group_ID"], 'group'):
                                                                update_assistant_access_level(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    group["Group_ID"],
                                                                    group["Group_Permission"],
                                                                    'group'
                                                                )
                                                            else:
                                                                insert_assistants_access(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    group["Group_Name"],
                                                                    group["Group_ID"],
                                                                    group["Group_Mail"],
                                                                    group["Group_Permission"],
                                                                    'group'
                                                                )
                                                        # 访问权限变更需要重新加载缓存
                                                        from utils.cache_update_helper import handle_assistant_access_update
                                                        handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully added {len(selected_groups)} group(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error adding groups: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                
                search_and_add_users_fragment()
                
                # 用户访问控制列表部分
                # @st.fragment
                def user_access_control_fragment():
                    with st.expander("User Access Control", expanded=True):
                        if len(st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list) > 0:
                            # 准备用户列表数据
                            user_list_data = []
                            group_list_data = []
                            
                            for item in st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list:
                                if item["Access_Type"] == "user":
                                    user_list_data.append({
                                        "User_ID": item["Access_By_Id"],
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "User_Name": item["Access_By"],
                                        "User_Email": item["Access_By_Email"],
                                        "User_Permission": item["Access_Level"]
                                    })
                                else:  # group
                                    group_list_data.append({
                                        "Group_ID": item["Access_By_Id"],
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "Group_Name": item["Access_By"],
                                        "Group_Email": item["Access_By_Email"],
                                        "Group_Permission": item["Access_Level"]
                                    })
                            
                            # 创建选项卡分别显示用户和用户组
                            access_control_tabs = st.tabs(["Users", "Groups"])
                            
                            # 用户列表选项卡
                            with access_control_tabs[0]:
                                if user_list_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户列表
                                    user_list_key = f"user_list_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_user_list = st.data_editor(
                                        user_list_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["User_Name", "User_Email"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "User_Name": "User Name",
                                            "User_Email": "User Email",
                                            "User_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "User Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            )
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "User_Name", "User_Email", "User_Permission"),
                                        key=user_list_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理删除选中的用户
                                    selected_users_to_delete = [user for user in edited_user_list if user["Selected"]]
                                    if selected_users_to_delete:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 3, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_users_to_delete)} user(s) to remove.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            remove_button_key = f"remove_selected_users_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Remove Selected Users", key=remove_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Removing users..."):
                                                        for user in selected_users_to_delete:
                                                            delete_assistant_access(
                                                                st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                user["User_ID"],
                                                                'user'
                                                            )
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully removed {len(selected_users_to_delete)} user(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error removing users: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                                    
                                    # 处理权限更新
                                    if user_list_key in st.session_state and 'edited_rows' in st.session_state[user_list_key]:
                                        edited_rows = st.session_state[user_list_key]['edited_rows']
                                        for row_idx, changes in edited_rows.items():
                                            if 'User_Permission' in changes:
                                                row_idx = int(row_idx)
                                                if row_idx < len(user_list_data):
                                                    user_id = user_list_data[row_idx]["User_ID"]
                                                    new_permission = changes['User_Permission']
                                                    update_assistant_access_level(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                        user_id,
                                                        new_permission,
                                                        'user'
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                else:
                                    st.info("No users in access control list.")
                            
                            # 用户组列表选项卡
                            with access_control_tabs[1]:
                                if group_list_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户组列表
                                    group_list_key = f"group_list_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_group_list = st.data_editor(
                                        group_list_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["Group_Name", "Group_Email"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "Group_Name": "Group Name",
                                            "Group_Email": "Group Email",
                                            "Group_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "Group Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            )
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "Group_Name", "Group_Email", "Group_Permission"),
                                        key=group_list_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理删除选中的用户组
                                    selected_groups_to_delete = [group for group in edited_group_list if group["Selected"]]
                                    if selected_groups_to_delete:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 4, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_groups_to_delete)} group(s) to remove.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            remove_group_button_key = f"remove_selected_groups_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Remove Selected Groups", key=remove_group_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Removing groups..."):
                                                        for group in selected_groups_to_delete:
                                                            delete_assistant_access(
                                                                st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                group["Group_ID"],
                                                                'group'
                                                            )
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully removed {len(selected_groups_to_delete)} group(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error removing groups: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                                    
                                    # 处理权限更新
                                    if group_list_key in st.session_state and 'edited_rows' in st.session_state[group_list_key]:
                                        edited_rows = st.session_state[group_list_key]['edited_rows']
                                        for row_idx, changes in edited_rows.items():
                                            if 'Group_Permission' in changes:
                                                row_idx = int(row_idx)
                                                if row_idx < len(group_list_data):
                                                    group_id = group_list_data[row_idx]["Group_ID"]
                                                    new_permission = changes['Group_Permission']
                                                    update_assistant_access_level(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                        group_id,
                                                        new_permission,
                                                        'group'
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                else:
                                    st.info("No groups in access control list.")
                        else:
                            st.info("No users or groups in access control list. Search and add users/groups if necessary.")
                
                user_access_control_fragment()

            except Exception as error:
                st.error(error)
                print(traceback.format_exc())

                                                        handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully added {len(selected_users)} user(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error adding users: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                        
                        # 用户组搜索选项卡
                        with search_tabs[1]:
                            group_search_form = st.form(key="form_create_bot_search_group", clear_on_submit=False, border=False)
                            empty_group_search_form_warning = st.empty()
                            
                            group_form_search_col1, group_form_search_col2 = group_search_form.columns([1, 1])
                            with group_form_search_col1:
                                st.text_input("Search Group", key='create_bot_search_group', label_visibility="collapsed")
                            with group_form_search_col2:
                                if group_search_form.form_submit_button("Search"):
                                    if len(st.session_state.create_bot_search_group) > 0:
                                        empty_group_search_form_warning.empty()
                                        output_json = auth.aad_search_group(st.session_state.create_bot_search_group)
                                        st.session_state.search_group_result_list = output_json["value"]
                                        if len(st.session_state.search_group_result_list) == 0:
                                            empty_group_search_form_warning.warning("No match result")
                                    else:
                                        empty_group_search_form_warning.warning("Please enter group name")
                                        st.session_state.search_group_result_list = []
                            
                            # 显示用户组搜索结果
                            if 'search_group_result_list' in st.session_state and len(st.session_state.search_group_result_list) > 0:
                                st.subheader("Search Result")
                                # 创建用户组搜索结果数据
                                group_search_results_data = []
                                for group in st.session_state.search_group_result_list:
                                    if group["id"] is None:
                                        continue
                                    
                                    # 检查用户组是否已经存在
                                    group_exists = any(g['Access_By_Id'] == str(group["id"]) and g['Access_Type'] == 'group' for g in st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list)
                                    
                                    group_search_results_data.append({
                                        "Group_ID": str(group["id"]),
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "Group_Name": str(group["displayName"]),
                                        "Group_Mail": str(group.get("mail", "")),
                                        "Group_Permission": "Chat-only",
                                        "Exists": group_exists
                                    })
                                
                                if group_search_results_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户组搜索结果
                                    group_search_key = f"group_search_results_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_group_search_results = st.data_editor(
                                        group_search_results_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["Group_Name", "Group_Mail", "Exists"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "Group_Name": "Group Name",
                                            "Group_Mail": "Group Email",
                                            "Group_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "Group Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            ),
                                            "Exists": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn("Already Added", disabled=True)
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "Group_Name", "Group_Mail", "Group_Permission", "Exists"),
                                        key=group_search_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理添加选中的用户组
                                    selected_groups = [group for group in edited_group_search_results if group["Selected"] and not group["Exists"]]
                                    if selected_groups:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 4, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_groups)} group(s) to add.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            add_group_button_key = f"add_selected_groups_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Add Selected Groups", key=add_group_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Adding groups..."):
                                                        for group in selected_groups:
                                                            if if_exist_assistant_access(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id, group["Group_ID"], 'group'):
                                                                update_assistant_access_level(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    group["Group_ID"],
                                                                    group["Group_Permission"],
                                                                    'group'
                                                                )
                                                            else:
                                                                insert_assistants_access(
                                                                    st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                    group["Group_Name"],
                                                                    group["Group_ID"],
                                                                    group["Group_Mail"],
                                                                    group["Group_Permission"],
                                                                    'group'
                                                                )
                                                        # 访问权限变更需要重新加载缓存
                                                        from utils.cache_update_helper import handle_assistant_access_update
                                                        handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully added {len(selected_groups)} group(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error adding groups: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
