def user_access_control_fragment():
                    with st.expander("User Access Control", expanded=True):
                        if len(st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list) > 0:
                            # 准备用户列表数据
                            user_list_data = []
                            group_list_data = []
                            
                            for item in st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list:
                                if item["Access_Type"] == "user":
                                    user_list_data.append({
                                        "User_ID": item["Access_By_Id"],
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "User_Name": item["Access_By"],
                                        "User_Email": item["Access_By_Email"],
                                        "User_Permission": item["Access_Level"]
                                    })
                                else:  # group
                                    group_list_data.append({
                                        "Group_ID": item["Access_By_Id"],
                                        "Selected": False,
                                        "Group_Name": item["Access_By"],
                                        "Group_Email": item["Access_By_Email"],
                                        "Group_Permission": item["Access_Level"]
                                    })
                            
                            # 创建选项卡分别显示用户和用户组
                            access_control_tabs = st.tabs(["Users", "Groups"])
                            
                            # 用户列表选项卡
                            with access_control_tabs[0]:
                                if user_list_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户列表
                                    user_list_key = f"user_list_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_user_list = st.data_editor(
                                        user_list_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["User_Name", "User_Email"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "User_Name": "User Name",
                                            "User_Email": "User Email",
                                            "User_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "User Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            )
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "User_Name", "User_Email", "User_Permission"),
                                        key=user_list_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理删除选中的用户
                                    selected_users_to_delete = [user for user in edited_user_list if user["Selected"]]
                                    if selected_users_to_delete:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 3, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_users_to_delete)} user(s) to remove.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            remove_button_key = f"remove_selected_users_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Remove Selected Users", key=remove_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Removing users..."):
                                                        for user in selected_users_to_delete:
                                                            delete_assistant_access(
                                                                st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                user["User_ID"],
                                                                'user'
                                                            )
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully removed {len(selected_users_to_delete)} user(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error removing users: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                                    
                                    # 处理权限更新
                                    if user_list_key in st.session_state and 'edited_rows' in st.session_state[user_list_key]:
                                        edited_rows = st.session_state[user_list_key]['edited_rows']
                                        for row_idx, changes in edited_rows.items():
                                            if 'User_Permission' in changes:
                                                row_idx = int(row_idx)
                                                if row_idx < len(user_list_data):
                                                    user_id = user_list_data[row_idx]["User_ID"]
                                                    new_permission = changes['User_Permission']
                                                    update_assistant_access_level(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                        user_id,
                                                        new_permission,
                                                        'user'
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                else:
                                    st.info("No users in access control list.")
                            
                            # 用户组列表选项卡
                            with access_control_tabs[1]:
                                if group_list_data:
                                    # 使用data_editor显示用户组列表
                                    group_list_key = f"group_list_editor_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                    edited_group_list = st.data_editor(
                                        group_list_data,
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        num_rows="fixed",
                                        disabled=["Group_Name", "Group_Email"],
                                        column_config={
                                            "Selected": st.column_config.CheckboxColumn(width="small"),
                                            "Group_Name": "Group Name",
                                            "Group_Email": "Group Email",
                                            "Group_Permission": st.column_config.SelectboxColumn(
                                                "Group Permission",
                                                options=["Chat-only", "Admin"],
                                                required=True,
                                            )
                                        },
                                        column_order=("Selected", "Group_Name", "Group_Email", "Group_Permission"),
                                        key=group_list_key
                                    )
                                    
                                    # 处理删除选中的用户组
                                    selected_groups_to_delete = [group for group in edited_group_list if group["Selected"]]
                                    if selected_groups_to_delete:
                                        col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 4, 1])
                                        with col1:
                                            st.write(f"Selected {len(selected_groups_to_delete)} group(s) to remove.")
                                        with col3:
                                            # 使用稳定的 key
                                            remove_group_button_key = f"remove_selected_groups_{st.session_state.selected_assistant_id}"
                                            if st.button("Remove Selected Groups", key=remove_group_button_key, type="primary", use_container_width=False):
                                                try:
                                                    with st.spinner("Removing groups..."):
                                                        for group in selected_groups_to_delete:
                                                            delete_assistant_access(
                                                                st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                                group["Group_ID"],
                                                                'group'
                                                            )
                                                        st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                            st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                        st.success(f"Successfully removed {len(selected_groups_to_delete)} group(s)!")
                                                        st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Error removing groups: {str(e)}")
                                                    print(traceback.format_exc())
                                    
                                    # 处理权限更新
                                    if group_list_key in st.session_state and 'edited_rows' in st.session_state[group_list_key]:
                                        edited_rows = st.session_state[group_list_key]['edited_rows']
                                        for row_idx, changes in edited_rows.items():
                                            if 'Group_Permission' in changes:
                                                row_idx = int(row_idx)
                                                if row_idx < len(group_list_data):
                                                    group_id = group_list_data[row_idx]["Group_ID"]
                                                    new_permission = changes['Group_Permission']
                                                    update_assistant_access_level(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id,
                                                        group_id,
                                                        new_permission,
                                                        'group'
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state.assistant_access_user_list = retrieve_assistant_access_user_list(
                                                        st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                                                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                                else:
                                    st.info("No groups in access control list.")
                        else:
                            st.info("No users or groups in access control list. Search and add users/groups if necessary.")

def delete_assistant_dialog():
    # POC迁移：使用OpenaiClient（仅用于文件操作）
    openai_client: OpenaiClient = st.session_state.custom_bot_creator_openai_client
    st.write(f"Are you sure you want to delete **{st.session_state.assistant_name}**?")

    del_assist_col1, del_assist_col2 = st.columns([1, 1])
    empty_status_delete_bot = st.empty()
    with del_assist_col1:
        if st.button("Yes", key='assistant_confirm_delete_yes', use_container_width=True):
            with empty_status_delete_bot.status("Delete assistant...", expanded=False) as status_delete_bot:
                try:
                    if custom_bot_selected.agent_type == 'dify':
                        from database.repository.custom_bot import delete_assistant_by_id
                        delete_assistant_by_id(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                        st.success("Deleted successfully")
                    else:
                        assistant_files: [File] = custom_bot_selected.get_assistant_files()
                        for assistant_file in assistant_files:
                            # POC迁移：只删除OpenAI上的文件，不需要unattach（因为没有真正的Assistant）
                            try:
                                delete_google_file_search_document_if_needed(assistant_file)
                                openai_client.client_delete_file(file_id=assistant_file.file_id)
                            except Exception as e:
                                print(f"Failed to delete file from OpenAI: {e}")
                            delete_file(file_id=assistant_file.file_id)
                            st.write(f"Delete assistant files {assistant_file.file_name}")
                        for assistant_sync_folder_tobe_del in (custom_bot_selected.sync_folders or []):
                            delete_assistant_sync_folder_by_id(assistant_sync_folder_tobe_del.folder_id)

                except:
                    st.warning("Delete assistant files failed")
                    custom_bot_selected.clear_assistant_files()
                    raise
                if not (custom_bot_selected.agent_type == 'dify'):
                    custom_bot_selected.clear_assistant_files()
                    # POC迁移：只更新数据库状态，不调用OpenAI删除（因为没有创建真正的Assistant）
                    update_assistant_status_with_assistant_id(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id, 'Deleted',
                                                              st.session_state.userName, st.session_state.userId)
            status_delete_bot.update(label="Delete assistant completed.", state='complete', expanded=False)
            # 删除后需要重新加载缓存
            handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
            reset_data_all()
            st.rerun()
    with del_assist_col2:
        if st.button("No", key='assistant_confirm_delete_no', use_container_width=True):
            # 关闭dialog，不需要额外的rerun
            st.rerun()

def dialog_import_vibe_app():
    with st.form("Import Vibe App", border=False):
        name = st.text_input(label="Name", max_chars=250)
        host = st.text_input(label="URL", max_chars=500)
        import_submit_cols = st.columns([1,1,1], gap=None)
        empty_status = st.empty()
        with import_submit_cols[0]:
            # if st.form_submit_button("Import", type="primary", width="stretch",  on_click=import_vibe_app,kwargs={"name": name, "host": host, "agent_type": "web"}):
            if st.form_submit_button("Import", type="primary", width="stretch"):
                if not name:
                    empty_status.warning("Name cannot be empty")
                elif not host:
                    empty_status.warning("URL cannot be empty")
                else:
                    status, output= vibeApp_client.import_vibe_app(name=name, host=host, agent_type="web")
                    if status:
                        empty_status.success("Import Successfully, dialog will be closed in seconds")
                        print(output)
                        reset_data_assistants_dict_admin_access()
                        # few seconds block for displaying success status
                        get_data_assistants_dict_admin_access()
                        st.rerun()
                    else:
                        empty_status.error(output)

        with import_submit_cols[2]:
            if st.form_submit_button("Cancel", width="stretch"):
                st.rerun()

def publish_assistant_to_store():
        # 初始化session state
        key_deploy_store_item_identity_image = f'deploy_store_item_identity_image_{page_unique_key}_{st_gui.selected_assistant_id}'
        if key_deploy_store_item_identity_image not in st.session_state:
            st.session_state[key_deploy_store_item_identity_image] = None

        def reset_deploy_store_item_identity_image():
            st.session_state[key_deploy_store_item_identity_image] = None

        empty_reminder_container = st.empty()

        # AI自动填充按钮
        try:
            if st.button("Auto-fill by AI", use_container_width=True, key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_ai_fill_in'):
                from utils.ai_store_utils import identify_store_item_response
                st.session_state[key_deploy_store_item_identity_image] = identify_store_item_response(
                    type='Vibe App',
                    content=f"host_url: {custom_bot_selected.host}",
                    temp_name=custom_bot_selected.assistant_name
                )
                st.rerun(scope='fragment')
        except Exception as error:
            st.error(error)

        try:
            with st.container(border=True):
                existing_store_item = custom_bot_selected.store_item

                # 获坖必覝的常針
                from utils.ai_store_utils import (
                    deploy_reminder_content_dict,
                    IdentityImageResponse,
                    st_resize_image,
                    st_markdown_rounded_image,
                    st_markdown_static_image,
                    fal_create_image,
                    image_select,
                    validate_text_input,
                    insert_store_item,
                    update_store_item,
                    delete_store_item,
                    StoreItem,
                    OPERATING_GROUP_LIST,
                    CATEGORY_LIST
                )

                if not existing_store_item and deploy_reminder_content_dict.get('Vibe App'):
                    empty_reminder_container.info(deploy_reminder_content_dict.get('Vibe App'))
                else:
                    empty_reminder_container.empty()

                identity_image_response = st.session_state[key_deploy_store_item_identity_image]
                empty_markdown_label = st.empty()

                # 设置默认值
                value_name = existing_store_item.name if existing_store_item else custom_bot_selected.assistant_name
                # 默认 Operating Group 从 Operating_Group 字段解枝（逗坷分隔）
                default_operating_groups = []
                if existing_store_item and getattr(existing_store_item, 'operating_group', None):
                    if isinstance(existing_store_item.operating_group, str):
                        default_operating_groups = [group.strip() for group in
                                                    existing_store_item.operating_group.split(',') if
                                                    group.strip() in OPERATING_GROUP_LIST]
                    elif isinstance(existing_store_item.operating_group, list):
                        default_operating_groups = [group for group in existing_store_item.operating_group if
                                                    group in OPERATING_GROUP_LIST]
                # 默认 Category（坕选）
                default_category_index = 0
                if existing_store_item and existing_store_item.category and existing_store_item.category in CATEGORY_LIST:
                    default_category_index = CATEGORY_LIST.index(existing_store_item.category)
                value_description = existing_store_item.description if existing_store_item else ""
                value_prompt_thumbnail_icon = existing_store_item.prompt_thumbnail_image if existing_store_item else ""
                value_usage = existing_store_item.usage if existing_store_item else ""
                value_disclose_instruction = existing_store_item.disclose_instruction if existing_store_item else True
                value_allow_access = existing_store_item.allow_access if existing_store_item else "Allow Chat"

                # ETA默认值设置
                value_eta = existing_store_item.eta if existing_store_item and existing_store_item.eta else None

                image_base64_strs = []
                thumbnail_image = None

                # 处睆AI生戝的内容
                if identity_image_response:
                    if identity_image_response.identity_response:
                        value_name = identity_image_response.identity_response.name

                        # 处睆 AI 生戝的 category（坕选）
                        if identity_image_response.identity_response.category:
                            # 检查 AI 生戝的 category 是坦在 CATEGORY_LIST 中
                            if identity_image_response.identity_response.category in CATEGORY_LIST:
                                default_category_index = CATEGORY_LIST.index(
                                    identity_image_response.identity_response.category)
                            else:
                                # 如果丝在列表中，保挝现有值
                                default_category_index = default_category_index
                        else:
                            # 如果 AI 没有生戝 category，保挝现有值
                            default_category_index = default_category_index

                        # 处睆 AI 生戝的 operating_groups（多选）
                        if hasattr(identity_image_response.identity_response,
                                   'operating_groups') and identity_image_response.identity_response.operating_groups:
                            # 过滤出在 OPERATING_GROUP_LIST 中的组
                            valid_operating_groups = [group for group in
                                                      identity_image_response.identity_response.operating_groups if
                                                      group in OPERATING_GROUP_LIST]
                            if valid_operating_groups:
                                default_operating_groups = valid_operating_groups
                            else:
                                # 如果没有有效的组，保挝现有值
                                default_operating_groups = default_operating_groups
                        else:
                            # 如果 AI 没有生戝 operating_groups，保挝现有值
                            default_operating_groups = default_operating_groups

                        value_description = identity_image_response.identity_response.short_description
                        value_prompt_thumbnail_icon = identity_image_response.identity_response.prompt_thumbnail_icon
                        value_usage = identity_image_response.identity_response.usage
                    image_base64_strs = identity_image_response.image_base64_strs if identity_image_response.image_base64_strs else image_base64_strs

                # 缩略图上传部分
                streamlit_utils.write_text_using_html("Thumbnail Image")
                thumbnail_image_cols = st.columns([2, 6])
                empty_thumbnail_image = thumbnail_image_cols[0].empty()
                empty_select_image_container = st.empty()
                thumbnail_image_container_key = f'{page_unique_key}_container_store_item_thumbnail_image'

                with empty_thumbnail_image.container(key=thumbnail_image_container_key):
                    empty_thumbnail_image_show = st.empty()

                    # 文件上传
                    key_uploaded_thumbnail_image = f"{page_unique_key}_ai_store_thumbnail_image_uploader_Agent_{st_gui.selected_assistant_id}"
                    uploaded_thumbnail_image = st.file_uploader(
                        "Choose an image",
                        type=["png", "jpeg", "jpg", "webp"],
                        accept_multiple_files=False,
                        label_visibility='collapsed',
                        key=key_uploaded_thumbnail_image
                    )

                    # 确定覝显示的缩略图
                    display_thumbnail_image = None
                    if uploaded_thumbnail_image:
                        print("Manually upload thumbnail_image")
                        display_thumbnail_image = base64.b64decode(st_resize_image(uploaded_thumbnail_image))
                    elif existing_store_item and existing_store_item.thumbnail_image:
                        display_thumbnail_image = existing_store_item.thumbnail_image

                    # 显示缩略图
                    if display_thumbnail_image:
                        with empty_thumbnail_image_show:
                            st_markdown_rounded_image(display_thumbnail_image)
                    else:
                        with empty_thumbnail_image_show:
                            st_markdown_static_image(static_path='app_icon.png')

                    streamlit_utils.mini_file_uploader("Upload image!", thumbnail_image_container_key)

                # AI生戝缩略图部分
                with thumbnail_image_cols[1]:
                    value_prompt_thumbnail_icon = value_prompt_thumbnail_icon[:998] + '..' if len(
                        value_prompt_thumbnail_icon) > 998 else value_prompt_thumbnail_icon
                    prompt_thumbnail_icon = st.text_area(
                        "Prompt to generate thumbnail image by AI",
                        value=value_prompt_thumbnail_icon,
                        placeholder="Prompt to generate thumbnail image by AI",
                        key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_prompt_thumbnail_icon',
                        label_visibility='collapsed',
                        max_chars=1000
                    )
                    if st.button("Generate", width="stretch", key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_generate_thumbnail_icon'):
                        with st.spinner('Image generating...'):
                            if len(prompt_thumbnail_icon.strip(" ")) >= 4:
                                generated_image_base64_strs = fal_create_image(prompt_thumbnail_icon)
                                if identity_image_response:
                                    temp_image_base64_strs = identity_image_response.image_base64_strs if identity_image_response.image_base64_strs else []
                                    temp_image_base64_strs.extend(generated_image_base64_strs)
                                    identity_image_response.image_base64_strs = temp_image_base64_strs
                                else:
                                    identity_image_response = IdentityImageResponse(
                                        image_base64_strs=generated_image_base64_strs)
                                st.session_state[key_deploy_store_item_identity_image] = identity_image_response
                                empty_select_image_container.empty()
                                st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                            else:
                                st.warning("At least 4 characters")

                # 表坕部分
                with st.form(f"{page_unique_key}_form_deploy_store_item", border=False):
                    # 图片选择
                    if image_base64_strs and not uploaded_thumbnail_image:
                        img_caption_list = ['Generated Image ' + str(image_index) for image_index in
                                            range(1, len(image_base64_strs) + 1)]
                        if existing_store_item and existing_store_item.thumbnail_image:
                            image_base64_strs = [base64.b64encode(
                                existing_store_item.thumbnail_image).decode()] + image_base64_strs
                            img_caption_list = ["Current Image"] + img_caption_list

                        with empty_select_image_container:
                            thumbnail_image_index = image_select(
                                label='Choose thumbnail image',
                                images=[Image.open(BytesIO(base64.b64decode(image_base64_str))) for image_base64_str in
                                        image_base64_strs],
                                key=f'{page_unique_key}_store_item_select_image',
                                captions=img_caption_list,
                                return_value="index",
                                use_container_width=False
                            )
                        print(f"thumbnail_image_index: {thumbnail_image_index}")
                        thumbnail_image = base64.b64decode(image_base64_strs[thumbnail_image_index])

                        # 立坳更新缩略图显示
                        with empty_thumbnail_image_show:
                            st_markdown_rounded_image(thumbnail_image)
                    else:
                        empty_select_image_container.empty()

                    # 表坕输入字段
                    store_item_name = st.text_input("Display Name", max_chars=50,
                                                    key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_name', value=value_name)
                    # store_item_eta = st.text_input(
                    #     "Display ETA ( Set user expectation for how long the agent will take to complete a request and provide response)​",
                    #     key='edit_agent_deploy_store_item_eta', value=value_eta,
                    #     placeholder="Immediately OR minutes range; 0~?? minutes​")
                    store_item_category = st.selectbox(
                        "Category",
                        options=CATEGORY_LIST,
                        index=default_category_index,
                        key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_category'
                    )

                    store_item_operating_groups = st.multiselect(
                        "Operating Group",
                        options=OPERATING_GROUP_LIST,
                        default=default_operating_groups,
                        key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_operating_groups',
                        help="Select one or more operating groups for this agent"
                    )
                    value_description = value_description[:998] + '..' if len(
                        value_description) > 998 else value_description
                    store_item_description = st.text_area("Description", max_chars=1000, key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_description', value=value_description)
                    store_item_usage = st.text_area(
                        "Ability", max_chars=4000,
                        key=f'{page_unique_key}_deploy_store_item_usage', value=value_usage)

                    # 公开指令选项
                    store_item_disclose_instruction = True
                    store_item_allow_access = "Allow Email Trigger"

                    # 按钮部分
                    btn_cols = st.columns([4, 2, 2])
                    if existing_store_item:
                        with empty_markdown_label.container(border=False):
                            st.success(
                                f"🎉Your Vibe App has been published and is now available in the [Vipe App Directory](/Vibe_App_Directory)! Feel free to check it out and make any updates.")
                        with btn_cols[0]:
                            st.markdown(existing_store_item.name,
                                        help=f"Updated by {existing_store_item.author} on {existing_store_item.updated_on}")
                        with btn_cols[1]:
                            if st.form_submit_button("Update", width="stretch"):
                                validate_text_input(text_input_str=store_item_name, text_input_label="Name")
                                print(f"Update store_item {existing_store_item.id}")
                                updated_store_item = StoreItem(
                                    id=existing_store_item.id,
                                    name=store_item_name,
                                    type=existing_store_item.type,
                                    ref_id=existing_store_item.ref_id,
                                    category=store_item_category,
                                    operating_group=','.join(
                                        store_item_operating_groups) if store_item_operating_groups else None,
                                    author=st.session_state.userName,
                                    description=store_item_description,
                                    usage=store_item_usage,
                                    thumbnail_image=thumbnail_image if thumbnail_image else existing_store_item.thumbnail_image,
                                    prompt_thumbnail_image=prompt_thumbnail_icon,
                                    updated_on=datetime.utcnow()
                                )
                                update_store_item(store_item=updated_store_item)
                                custom_bot_selected.store_item = updated_store_item
                                clear_vibe_apps_dictionary_cache()  # 清除Agent Dictionary缓存
                                reset_deploy_store_item_identity_image()
                                st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                        with btn_cols[2]:
                            if st.form_submit_button("Remove", use_container_width=True, type="primary"):
                                delete_store_item(store_item=existing_store_item)
                                clear_vibe_apps_dictionary_cache()  # 清除Agent Dictionary缓存
                                reset_deploy_store_item_identity_image()
                                custom_bot_selected.store_item = None
                                st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                    else:
                        empty_markdown_label.empty()
                        if st.form_submit_button("Publish", use_container_width=True):
                            validate_text_input(text_input_str=store_item_name, text_input_label="Name")
                            store_item = StoreItem(
                                name=store_item_name,
                                type='Vibe App',
                                ref_id=st_gui.selected_assistant_id,
                                category=store_item_category,
                                operating_group=','.join(
                                    store_item_operating_groups) if store_item_operating_groups else None,
                                author=st.session_state.userName,
                                description=store_item_description,
                                usage=store_item_usage,
                                thumbnail_image=thumbnail_image,
                                prompt_thumbnail_image=prompt_thumbnail_icon,
                                released_on=datetime.utcnow(),
                                updated_on=datetime.utcnow()
                            )
                            inserted_store_item = insert_store_item(store_item)
                            st.success("Successfully published.")
                            custom_bot_selected.store_item = inserted_store_item
                            clear_vibe_apps_dictionary_cache()  # 清除Agent Dictionary缓存
                            reset_deploy_store_item_identity_image()
                            st.rerun(scope="fragment")
        except Exception as error:
            st.error(error)
            print(traceback.format_exc())

def delete_assistant_dialog():
        st.write(custom_bot_selected.assistant_name)
        del_assist_col1, del_assist_col2 = st.columns([1, 1])
        empty_status_delete_bot = st.empty()
        with del_assist_col1:
            if st.button("Yes", key=f'{page_unique_key}_assistant_confirm_delete_yes', width="stretch"):
                with empty_status_delete_bot.status("Delete Vibe App...", expanded=False) as status_delete_bot:
                    try:
                        if custom_bot_selected.agent_type in ['web']:
                            delete_assistant_by_id(custom_bot_selected.assistant_id)
                            st.success("Deleted successfully")
                    except Exception as e:
                        st.error(f"Delete failed: {str(e)}")
                        print(traceback.format_exc())
                status_delete_bot.update(label="Delete Vibe App completed.", state='complete', expanded=False)
                # 删除坎需覝針新加载缓存
                # handle_assistant_access_update(st.session_state.selected_assistant_id)
                # clear_agent_dictionary_cache()  # 清除Agent Dictionary缓存
                reset_data_assistants_dict_admin_access()
                # few seconds block for displaying success status
                get_data_assistants_dict_admin_access()
                st.rerun()
        with del_assist_col2:
            if st.button("No", key='edit_agent_assistant_confirm_delete_no', use_container_width=True):
                st.rerun()

def _extract_file_paths(text: str) -> list[str]:
    """从 assistant 回复文本中提取所有 /home/user/... 文件路径"""
    found = _FILE_PATH_PATTERN.findall(text)
    # 去重并保持顺序
    seen = set()
    result = []
    for p in found:
        if p not in seen:
            seen.add(p)
            result.append(p)
    return result

def _fmt_sandbox(sid: str) -> str:
            info  = next((s for s in sandboxes if s.sandbox_id == sid), None)
            if not info:
                return sid[:12]
            state = str(info.state).upper()
            color = "green" if state == "RUNNING" else "grey"
            # return f"{sid[:12]}… :{color}-background[{state}]"
            return f"{sid[:12]}… :{state}"

def _render_input_bar():
    bottom_container.empty()
    is_running  = st.session_state[KEY_RUNNING]
    has_sandbox = bool(st.session_state[KEY_SANDBOX_ID])

    with bottom_container.container(border=False):
        input_cols = st.columns([1, 6, 1], vertical_alignment="bottom")

        with input_cols[0]:
            @st.fragment
            def _model_selector():
                current_cfg = st.session_state[KEY_MODEL]
                st.selectbox(
                    "Model",
                    options=CHATBOT_MODELS_CONFIG,
                    format_func=lambda o: o["model_short_name"],
                    index=CHATBOT_MODELS_CONFIG.index(current_cfg),
                    key=KEY_MODEL_INPUT,
                    disabled=is_running,
                    label_visibility="collapsed",
                )
                if st.session_state.get(KEY_MODEL_INPUT) and \
                   st.session_state[KEY_MODEL_INPUT] != st.session_state[KEY_MODEL]:
                    st.session_state[KEY_MODEL] = st.session_state[KEY_MODEL_INPUT]
                    st.rerun()
            _model_selector()

        with input_cols[1]:
            placeholder = (
                "Select or create a sandbox first…" if not has_sandbox
                else "Ask the agent to do something in the sandbox…"
            )
            st.chat_input(
                placeholder=placeholder,
                disabled=is_running or not has_sandbox,
                key=f"{PAGE_UNIQUE_KEY_STRING}_chat_input",
            )

        with input_cols[2]:
            if is_running:
                st.markdown("⏳ Running…")
            else:
                provider = st.session_state[KEY_MODEL].get("provider", "")
                badge    = "🔵" if provider == "anthropic" else "🟢"
                st.markdown(f"{badge} Ready")

def on_tool_start(name: str, tool_input: dict):
        """
        【FIX-RENDER-3】工具调用开始：
          - 在 tool_status 占位符中显示正在执行的工具名和参数
          - 同时写入 UI 日志（type=tool_start，rerun 后会展示）
        """
        # 取出命令文本（run_command 专用）
        command = tool_input.get("command", "")
        # 在实时区域显示
        with tool_status.container():
            st.info(
                f"🔧 Running **{name}**"
                + (f"\n\n```bash\n{command}\n```" if command else
                   f"\n\n```json\n{json.dumps(tool_input, ensure_ascii=False)[:300]}\n```")
            )
        # 写入历史日志
        st.session_state[KEY_UI_LOG].append({
            "role":      "tool",
            "type":      "tool_start",
            "tool_name": name,
            "command":   command,                              # 【FIX-RENDER-3】保存命令
            "content":   tool_input,
            "result":    "",
        })

def on_tool_result(name: str, result: str):
        """
        【FIX-RENDER-3】工具执行完成：
          - 更新 tool_status 为 success
          - 更新历史日志中对应条目
        """
        elapsed = f"{time.time() - start_time:.1f}s"
        with tool_status.container():
            st.success(f"✅ **{name}** completed ({elapsed})")
        # 更新历史日志
        for entry in reversed(st.session_state[KEY_UI_LOG]):
            if entry.get("role") == "tool" and entry.get("tool_name") == name \
                    and entry.get("type") == "tool_start":
                entry["result"] = result
                entry["type"]   = "tool_result"
                break

class E2bGUISandboxConfig:
    # BaseModel data class which below variables are instance variable
    sandbox_terminal_output: str = ''
    sandbox_terminal_pid: int|None = None
    sandbox_host_url: str = ''
    sandbox_entry_root_path: str = "/home/user"
    sandbox_entry_current_path: str = "/home/user"
    sandbox_files_entry: list[EntryInfo] | None = None

def on_output(data):
                    """Callback to handle new output from the sandbox"""
                    # Append to state so it persists across reruns

                    # st_gui.config.sandbox_terminal_output_last_active = time.time()
                    selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_terminal_output += data + "\n"
                    with message_empty:
                        st.code(body=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_terminal_output, language="bash")
