def files_entry():

                        @st.dialog("Add directory", icon=":material/add:", width="medium")
                        def dialog_add_directory():
                            with st.form("form_dialog_add_directory", border=False):
                                st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path}")
                                name = st.text_input("Name")
                                add_directory_submit_cols = st.columns([1,1,1])
                                with add_directory_submit_cols[0]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("OK", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_add_directory_ok', width="stretch"):
                                        status, status_msg = e2b_client.sandbox_files_add_directory(sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, timeout=timeout, parent_path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path, directory_name=name)
                                        print(f"add_directory -> status: {status}, status_msg: {status_msg}")
                                        if status:
                                            get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                            st.rerun()
                                        else:
                                            with add_directory_submit_cols[1]:
                                                st.error(f"error: {status_msg}")
                                                # st.markdown(f"error message: {status_msg}")
                                with add_directory_submit_cols[2]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Cancel",key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_add_directory_cancel', width="stretch"):
                                        st.rerun()

                        @st.dialog("Upload files", icon=":material/upload_file:", width="medium", dismissible=False)
                        def dialog_upload_files():
                            st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path}")
                            file_upload_tabs = st.tabs(["Upload files", "Upload a directory"])
                            st.caption("New uploads will replace existing files.")
                            with file_upload_tabs[0]:
                                uploaded_files = st.file_uploader("Select files", accept_multiple_files=True,
                                                                  key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_filesystem_file_uploader_files')
                            with file_upload_tabs[1]:
                                uploaded_directory_files = st.file_uploader("Select directory", accept_multiple_files="directory", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_filesystem_file_uploader_directory')
                            upload_files_submit_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                            with upload_files_submit_cols[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel",
                                                         key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_upload_files_cancel',
                                                         width="stretch"):
                                    st.rerun()

                            with upload_files_submit_cols[0]:
                                if st.button("Upload", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_upload_files_upload',
                                                         width="stretch"):
                                    all_uploaded_files = uploaded_files + uploaded_directory_files
                                    if all_uploaded_files:
                                        e2b_client.sandbox_upload_files(
                                            sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                            parent_path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path,
                                            uploaded_files=all_uploaded_files,
                                            timeout=timeout
                                        )
                                        get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                        st.rerun()
                                    else:
                                        with upload_files_submit_cols[1]:
                                            st.info("Please select files")

                        @st.dialog(f"Move & Rename",icon=":material/edit_document:", width="medium", dismissible=False)
                        def dialog_rename_file_entry(file_entry_path: str, file_entry_type : str = dir):
                            st.info("Renaming works by copying to a new location, then deleting the source item. ")
                            with st.form("form_dialog_rename_file_entry", border=False):
                                st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {file_entry_path}" if file_entry_type == "dir" else f":material/file_open: {file_entry_path}")

                                new_location = st.text_input("New Location", value=file_entry_path)
                                dialog_rename_submit_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                                with dialog_rename_submit_cols[0]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Submit", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_rename_file_entry_rename', width="stretch"):
                                        try:
                                            e2b_client.sandbox_file_entry_rename(
                                                sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                                old_path=file_entry_path,
                                                new_path=new_location,
                                                timeout=timeout
                                            )
                                            # fetch updated file entry
                                            get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                            st.rerun()
                                        except Exception as rename_error:
                                            with dialog_rename_submit_cols[1]:
                                                st.error(rename_error)

                                with dialog_rename_submit_cols[2]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Cancel",key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_rename_file_entry_cancel', width="stretch"):
                                        st.rerun()

                        @st.dialog("Confirm Deletion", icon=":material/delete:", width="medium", dismissible=False)
                        def dialog_delete_files(selected_entries):
                            st.warning("Are you sure you want to delete the following items? This action cannot be undone.")
                            delete_key = f'delete_tree_preview_{selected_sandbox_id}'

                            if delete_key not in st.session_state:
                                with st.spinner("Analyzing file structure..."):
                                    tree_data = []
                                    for entry in selected_entries:
                                        item_structure = {'entry': entry, 'path': entry.path, 'children': None}
                                        if entry.type == FileType.DIR:
                                            item_structure['children'] = e2b_client.sandbox_files_list_recursive(
                                                selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout, max_duration=5.0)
                                        tree_data.append(item_structure)
                                    st.session_state[delete_key] = tree_data

                            with st.container(border=True, gap=None, height=200):
                                if delete_key in st.session_state:
                                    render_file_tree_flat(st.session_state[delete_key])

                            col_submit = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                            with col_submit[0]:
                                if st.button("Confirm Delete", type="primary", use_container_width=True,
                                             key="btn_confirm_del_final"):
                                    with st.spinner("Deleting..."):
                                        for entry in selected_entries:
                                            e2b_client.sandbox_files_remove(selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout)

                                    # clean_dialog_state()  # 必须清理
                                    get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                    st.success("Deleted!")
                                    time.sleep(0.5)
                                    st.rerun()

                            with col_submit[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel", key="btn_cancel_delete", use_container_width=True):
                                    st.rerun()

                        @st.dialog("Download Files", icon=":material/download:", width="medium", on_dismiss="rerun")
                        def dialog_download_files(selected_entries):
                            download_key = f'download_tree_preview_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            is_single_file = len(selected_entries) == 1 and selected_entries[0].type == FileType.FILE
                            if not is_single_file:
                                st.write("The selected files will be compressed into a ZIP archive.")

                            status_container = st.empty()
                            with status_container.status("Preparing download...", expanded=True) as status:
                                st.write("Analyzing file structure...")
                                if download_key not in st.session_state:
                                    # 递归获取完整文件列表
                                    full_tree_data = []
                                    for entry in selected_entries:
                                        item_structure = {'entry': entry, 'path': entry.path, 'children': None}
                                        if entry.type == FileType.DIR:
                                            # 设置较长的超时时间，确保打包完整性
                                            item_structure['children'] = e2b_client.sandbox_files_list_recursive(
                                                selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout, max_duration=5.0)
                                        full_tree_data.append(item_structure)

                                    st.session_state[download_key] = full_tree_data

                                # st.write("Compressing files...")

                            st.markdown("##### File List")
                            with st.container(border=True, gap=None, height=200):
                                if download_key in st.session_state:
                                    render_file_tree_flat(st.session_state[download_key])

                            col_submit = st.columns([1, 1, 1])

                            with col_submit[0]:
                                if is_single_file:
                                    entry = selected_entries[0]

                                    st.download_button(
                                        label="⬇️ Download File",
                                        data=lambda: e2b_client.get_file_data(selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, 60),
                                        file_name=entry.name,
                                        # mime=entry.type,
                                        on_click="ignore",
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        type="primary",
                                        key="btn_auto_download_ready"
                                    )
                                else:
                                    selected_paths = [entry.path for entry in selected_entries]
                                    st.download_button(
                                        label="⬇️ Download ZIP",
                                        data=lambda: e2b_client.create_zip_in_sandbox(selected_sandbox_id, selected_paths, 100),
                                        file_name=f"sandbox_files_{int(time.time())}.zip",
                                        mime="application/zip",
                                        on_click="ignore",
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        type="primary",
                                        key="btn_auto_download_ready"
                                    )

                            with col_submit[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel", key="btn_cancel_dl", use_container_width=True):
                                    st.rerun()

                            status.update(label="Ready!", state="complete", expanded=False)

                        @st.dialog("File Detail", icon=":material/file_open:", width="large", on_dismiss="rerun")
                        def dialog_file_detail(file_entry):
                            # clean_dialog_state()

                            # 用文件路径作为标记，确保切换文件时强制刷新
                            last_file_key = f'file_detail_last_path_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            content_key = f'file_detail_content_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            edited_key = f'file_detail_edited_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            category_key = f'file_detail_category_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            editor_key = f'file_detail_editor_{selected_sandbox_id}'

                            if st.session_state.get(last_file_key) != file_entry.path:
                                for k in [content_key, edited_key, category_key, editor_key]:
                                    if k in st.session_state:
                                        del st.session_state[k]
                                st.session_state[last_file_key] = file_entry.path


                            def load_file_content():
                                """从 sandbox 加载文件，写入 session_state"""
                                raw = e2b_client.sandbox_files_read_bytes(
                                    sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                    path=file_entry.path,
                                    timeout=60
                                )
                                file_bytes = bytes(raw)
                                category = e2b_client.detect_file_category(file_bytes, file_entry.name)
                                st.session_state[category_key] = category
                                st.session_state[content_key] = file_bytes
                                st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                # if editor_key in st.session_state:
                                #     del st.session_state[editor_key]

                            file_path = file_entry.path
                            SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES = 15 * 1024 * 1024  # 15MB

                            # ── 首次加载 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
                            if content_key not in st.session_state:
                                if file_entry.size > SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES:
                                    # 超限：只存一个标记，不读文件
                                    st.session_state[content_key] = b''  # 占位，防止重复触发
                                    st.session_state[category_key] = '__overlimit__'
                                    st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                else:
                                    with st.spinner("Loading file..."):
                                        try:
                                            load_file_content()
                                        except Exception as e:
                                            st.error(f"Failed to load file: {e}")
                                            st.stop()

                            file_bytes: bytes = st.session_state[content_key]
                            file_category: str = st.session_state.get(category_key, 'binary')
                            is_text = file_category == 'text'
                            is_image = file_category == 'image'
                            is_video = file_category == 'video'
                            is_audio = file_category == 'audio'
                            is_overlimit = st.session_state.get(category_key) == '__overlimit__'

                            # ── 顶部文件名 + 元信息 ───────────────────────────────────────
                            file_name = file_entry.name
                            file_ext = PurePosixPath(file_name).suffix.lower() or 'unknown'
                            file_size_str = e2b_client.format_file_size(file_entry.size)
                            display_name = file_name if len(file_name) <= 60 else file_name[:57] + "..."
                            st.markdown(f"### {display_name}", help=file_name if len(file_name) > 60 else None)
                            st.caption(f"Type: `{file_ext}`　　Size: `{file_size_str}`　　Path: `{file_entry.path}`")
                            # allow_display = file_entry.size <= 20 * 1024 * 1024  # 20MB
                            # st.divider()

                            # ── 六个操作标签按钮 ──────────────────────────────────────────
                            # tab_edit, tab_download, tab_delete, tab_refresh, tab_save, tab_discard = st.tabs([
                            #     "✏️ Edit", "⬇️ Download", "🗑️ Delete", "🔄 Refresh", "💾 Save", "↩️ Discard"
                            # ])
                            tab_edit, tab_download, tab_delete = st.tabs([
                                "✏️ Edit", "⬇️ Download", "🗑️ Delete"
                            ])

                            # ── Edit 标签 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_edit:
                                if is_overlimit:
                                    st.warning(f"This file is **{file_size_str}**, which exceeds the 15 MB preview limit. Please download the file to view its content.")
                                elif is_text:
                                    has_edits = st.session_state.get(edited_key, False)
                                    action_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 6])
                                    with action_cols[0]:
                                        if st.button(
                                                "💾 Save", type="primary",
                                                disabled=not has_edits,
                                                use_container_width=True,
                                                key=f'file_detail_save_inline_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        ):
                                            with st.spinner("Saving..."):
                                                try:
                                                    save_content = st.session_state.get(content_key, b'')
                                                    if isinstance(save_content, bytes):
                                                        save_content = save_content.decode('utf-8')
                                                    e2b_client.sandbox_files_write_text(
                                                        sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                                        path=file_entry.path,
                                                        content=save_content,
                                                        timeout=timeout
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                                    st.success("Saved.")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Save failed: {e}")
                                    with action_cols[1]:
                                        if st.button(
                                                "↩️ Discard",
                                                disabled=not has_edits,
                                                use_container_width=True,
                                                key=f'file_detail_discard_inline_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        ):
                                            for k in [content_key, edited_key, category_key, editor_key]:
                                                if k in st.session_state:
                                                    del st.session_state[k]
                                            st.rerun()

                                    text_content = file_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                                    text_content = e2b_client.strip_ansi(text_content)  # 剥离 ANSI 转义码

                                    def on_change_editor():
                                        st.session_state[edited_key] = True
                                        # 将编辑后的内容同步回 content_key（以 bytes 形式存储）
                                        # editor_key = f'file_detail_editor_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        if editor_key in st.session_state:
                                            st.session_state[content_key] = st.session_state[editor_key].encode('utf-8')

                                    st.text_area(
                                        label="File content",
                                        value=text_content,
                                        height=450,
                                        label_visibility="collapsed",
                                        key=editor_key,
                                        on_change=on_change_editor
                                    )

                                    if st.session_state.get(edited_key):
                                        st.caption("⚠️ Unsaved changes — use the **Save** or **Discard** button.")

                                elif is_image:
                                    st.image(file_bytes)

                                elif is_video:
                                    st.video(file_bytes)

                                elif is_audio:
                                    st.audio(file_bytes)

                                elif file_ext == '.pdf':
                                    # st.pdf(file_bytes)
                                    import base64
                                    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode('utf-8')
                                    pdf_html = f'''
                                            <iframe
                                                src="data:application/pdf;base64,{b64}"
                                                width="100%"
                                                height="500px"
                                                style="border: none; border-radius: 4px;"
                                            ></iframe>
                                        '''
                                    st.markdown(pdf_html, unsafe_allow_html=True)

                                else:
                                    st.info("Preview is not supported for this file type. You can still download it.")

                            # ── Download 标签 ─────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_download:
                                st.info(f"Download **{file_name}** from sandbox.")

                                st.download_button(
                                    label=f"⬇️ Download {file_name}",
                                    data=lambda: e2b_client.get_file_data(sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, path=file_path, timeout=60),
                                    file_name=file_name,
                                    on_click="ignore",
                                    use_container_width=True,
                                    type="primary",
                                    key=f'file_detail_download_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                )

                            # ── Delete 标签 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_delete:
                                st.warning(
                                    f"Are you sure you want to delete **{file_name}**? This action cannot be undone.")
                                delete_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 2])
                                with delete_cols[0]:
                                    if st.button("Confirm Delete", type="primary", use_container_width=True,
                                                 key=f'file_detail_confirm_delete_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                                        with st.spinner("Deleting..."):
                                            try:
                                                e2b_client.sandbox_files_remove(
                                                    sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, path=file_path, timeout=timeout)
                                                get_files_entry(
                                                    path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                                st.success("Deleted successfully.")
                                                import time as _time;
                                                _time.sleep(0.5)
                                                st.rerun()
                                            except Exception as e:
                                                st.error(f"Failed to delete: {e}")
                                with delete_cols[1]:
                                    if st.button("Cancel", use_container_width=True,
                                                 key=f'file_detail_cancel_delete_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                                        st.rerun()

                            # ── Refresh 标签 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
                            # with tab_refresh:
                            #     # st.write("Reload the file content from sandbox.")
                            #     # if st.button("🔄 Refresh Now", type="primary",
                            #     #              key=f'file_detail_refresh_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                            #     #     if content_key in st.session_state:
                            #     #         del st.session_state[content_key]
                            #     #     if edited_key in st.session_state:
                            #     #         del st.session_state[edited_key]
                            #     #     st.rerun()
                            #
                            #     @st.fragment
                            #     def refresh_panel():
                            #         st.info("Reload the file content from sandbox.")
                            #         if st.button("🔄 Refresh Now", type="primary",
                            #                      key=f'file_detail_refresh_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                            #             with st.spinner("Refreshing..."):
                            #                 try:
                            #                     load_file_content()
                            #                     st.success("File reloaded. Switch to Edit tab to view latest content.")
                            #                     st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                            #                 except Exception as e:
                            #                     st.error(f"Failed to refresh: {e}")
                            #
                            #     refresh_panel()

                            # ── Save 标签 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
                            # with tab_save:
                            #     if not is_text:
                            #         st.info("Save is only available for text-based files.")
                            #     elif not st.session_state.get(edited_key):
                            #         st.info("No unsaved changes.")
                            #     else:
                            #         st.info("Save current edits back to sandbox.")
                            #         if st.button("💾 Save to Sandbox", type="primary",
                            #                      key=f'file_detail_save_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                            #             with st.spinner("Saving..."):
                            #                 try:
                            #                     e2b_client.sandbox_files_write_text(
                            #                         sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                            #                         path=file_path,
                            #                         content=st.session_state[content_key],
                            #                         timeout=timeout
                            #                     )
                            #                     st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                            #                     st.success("Saved successfully.")
                            #                 except Exception as e:
                            #                     st.error(f"Failed to save: {e}")

                            # ── Discard 标签 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
                            # with tab_discard:
                            #     if not is_text:
                            #         st.info("Discard is only available for text-based files.")
                            #     elif not st.session_state.get(edited_key):
                            #         st.info("No unsaved changes to discard.")
                            #     else:
                            #         st.warning("This will discard all unsaved changes and reload the original file.")
                            #         if st.button("↩️ Discard Changes", type="primary",
                            #                      key=f'file_detail_discard_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                            #             if content_key in st.session_state:
                            #                 del st.session_state[content_key]
                            #             if edited_key in st.session_state:
                            #                 del st.session_state[edited_key]
                            #             st.rerun()


                        with st.container(horizontal=True):
                            empty_add_dir = st.empty()
                            empty_add_dir.button(":material/add: Add directory", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_add_directory_disable',type="tertiary", disabled=True)
                            empty_upload_files = st.empty()
                            empty_upload_files.button(":material/upload_file: Upload files",key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_upload_files_disable', type="tertiary",disabled=True)
                            empty_refresh = st.empty()
                            empty_refresh.button(":material/refresh: Refresh", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_refresh_disable',type="tertiary", disabled=True)
                            empty_download = st.empty()
                            empty_download.button(":material/download: Download", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_download_disable', type="tertiary", disabled=True)
                            empty_rename = st.empty()
                            empty_rename.button(":material/edit_document: Move & Rename", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_rename_disable',type="tertiary", disabled=True)
                            empty_delete = st.empty()
                            empty_delete.button(":material/delete: Delete", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_delete_disable',type="tertiary", disabled=True)

                        if selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry is not None:
                            empty_add_dir.button(":material/add: Add directory", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_add_directory',type="tertiary", on_click=dialog_add_directory)
                            empty_upload_files.button(":material/upload_file: Upload files",key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_upload_files', type="tertiary",on_click=dialog_upload_files)
                            empty_refresh.button(":material/refresh: Refresh", key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_refresh',type="tertiary", on_click=get_files_entry,kwargs={"path": selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path})
                            with st.container(border=True):
                                st.write(f":material/folder_open: {selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path}")
                                empty_show_info = st.empty()
                                empty_show_info.write(f"Showing all {len(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry)} items")

                                key_files_entry_container = f'{file_system_unique_key}_files_entry_container'
                                with st.container(key=key_files_entry_container):

                                    ## top header row
                                    file_system_item_top_cols = st.columns([1, 4, 4, 4, 4, 1], gap=None, vertical_alignment="center")
                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[0]:
                                        key_checkbox_top = f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_checkbox_top'
                                        def on_change_top_checkbox():
                                            for entry_index, entry in enumerate(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry):
                                                # sync all sub checkbox
                                                entry_checkbox_key_tobe_sync = f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_checkbox_{entry_index}'
                                                st.session_state[entry_checkbox_key_tobe_sync] = st.session_state[key_checkbox_top]
                                        st.checkbox("check", label_visibility="collapsed", key=key_checkbox_top, on_change=on_change_top_checkbox)

                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[1]:
                                        st.markdown("Name")
                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[2]:
                                        st.markdown("Last modified")
                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[3]:
                                        st.markdown("Size")
                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[4]:
                                        st.markdown("type")
                                    with file_system_item_top_cols[5]:
                                        # st.button(":material/more_horiz:", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_filesystem_more_horiz',type="tertiary")
                                        st.markdown(custom_row_css_html(key_files_entry_container), unsafe_allow_html=True)


                                    def on_click_dir_btn(btn_path: str|None):
                                        if btn_path:
                                            get_files_entry(path=btn_path)
                                            selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path = btn_path
                                            # reset checkbox top
                                            st.session_state[key_checkbox_top] = False

                                    # show parent button if current path is not root
                                    if selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path != selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_root_path:
                                        file_entry_parent_cols = st.columns([1, 4, 4, 4, 4, 1], gap=None,vertical_alignment="center")
                                        with file_entry_parent_cols[1]:
                                            st.button(
                                                f"[..]",
                                                key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_name_parent',type="tertiary",
                                                on_click=on_click_dir_btn, kwargs={"btn_path": str(Path(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path).parent.as_posix())}
                                            )
                                                # path = Path(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                                # parent = str(path.parent.as_posix())
                                                # print(parent)
                                                # get_files_entry(path=parent)
                                                # selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path = parent
                                                # st.rerun(scope="fragment")

                                    ## file entry rows
                                    for file_entry_index, file_entry in enumerate(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry):
                                        file_entry_cols = st.columns([1, 4, 4, 4, 4, 1], gap=None,vertical_alignment="center")
                                        with file_entry_cols[0]:
                                            st.checkbox("check", label_visibility="collapsed",key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_checkbox_{file_entry_index}')
                                        with file_entry_cols[1]:
                                            # btn_label = file_entry.name
                                            btn_label = file_entry.name.replace('_','\_')
                                            if file_entry.type is FileType.FILE:
                                                btn_label = f":material/file_open: {btn_label}"
                                            elif file_entry.type is FileType.DIR:
                                                btn_label = f":material/folder: {btn_label}"
                                            # print(btn_label)

                                            if file_entry.type is FileType.DIR:
                                                st.button(btn_label[:40], key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_name_{file_entry_index}', type="tertiary", on_click=on_click_dir_btn, help=file_entry.name if len(btn_label) > 40 else None, kwargs={"btn_path": file_entry.path})
                                            else:
                                                # st.markdown(btn_label[:40], help=file_entry.name if len(btn_label) > 40 else None)
                                                st.button(
                                                    btn_label[:40],
                                                    key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_name_{file_entry_index}',
                                                    type="tertiary",
                                                    help=file_entry.name if len(btn_label) > 40 else None,
                                                    on_click=dialog_file_detail,
                                                    kwargs={"file_entry": file_entry}
                                                )


                                        with file_entry_cols[2]:
                                            st.markdown(auth.localize_datetime(file_entry.modified_time).strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
                                        with file_entry_cols[3]:
                                            st.markdown(e2b_client.format_file_size(file_entry.size))
                                        with file_entry_cols[4]:
                                            st.markdown(file_entry.type)
                                        with file_entry_cols[5]:
                                            st.button(":material/more_horiz:",key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_more_{file_entry_index}',type="tertiary")

                                ## file system selection handling
                                check_count = 0
                                selected_sandbox_files_entry = []
                                for e_index, e in enumerate(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry):
                                    entry_checkbox_key = f'{file_system_unique_key}_file_entry_checkbox_{e_index}'
                                    if entry_checkbox_key in st.session_state and st.session_state[entry_checkbox_key]:
                                        check_count+=1
                                        selected_sandbox_files_entry.append(e)
                                if check_count >0:
                                    empty_show_info.write(f"Showing all {len(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry)} items ({check_count} selected)")
                                # else:
                                #     empty_show_info.write(f"Showing all {len(selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_files_entry)} items")

                                # adv_menu
                                if check_count == 1:
                                    empty_rename.button(
                                        ":material/edit_document: Move & Rename",
                                        key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_rename',
                                        type="tertiary", on_click=dialog_rename_file_entry,
                                        kwargs={"file_entry_path": selected_sandbox_files_entry[0].path, "file_entry_type": selected_sandbox_files_entry[0].type.value}
                                    )
                                if check_count > 0:
                                    # 定义打开弹窗的 Wrapper 函数
                                    def open_download_dialog_wrapper():
                                        clean_dialog_state()  # 关键：点击主界面按钮时，先清理旧状态
                                        dialog_download_files(selected_sandbox_files_entry)

                                    def open_delete_dialog_wrapper():
                                        clean_dialog_state()
                                        dialog_delete_files(selected_sandbox_files_entry)

                                    empty_download.button(
                                        ":material/download: Download",
                                        key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_download',
                                        type="tertiary",
                                        on_click=open_download_dialog_wrapper,
                                        # kwargs={"selected_entries": selected_sandbox_files_entry}
                                    )
                                    empty_delete.button(
                                        ":material/delete: Delete",
                                        key=f'{file_system_unique_key}_delete',
                                        type="tertiary",
                                        on_click=open_delete_dialog_wrapper,
                                        # kwargs={"selected_entries": selected_sandbox_files_entry}
                                    )

def dialog_add_directory():
                            with st.form("form_dialog_add_directory", border=False):
                                st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path}")
                                name = st.text_input("Name")
                                add_directory_submit_cols = st.columns([1,1,1])
                                with add_directory_submit_cols[0]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("OK", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_add_directory_ok', width="stretch"):
                                        status, status_msg = e2b_client.sandbox_files_add_directory(sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, timeout=timeout, parent_path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path, directory_name=name)
                                        print(f"add_directory -> status: {status}, status_msg: {status_msg}")
                                        if status:
                                            get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                            st.rerun()
                                        else:
                                            with add_directory_submit_cols[1]:
                                                st.error(f"error: {status_msg}")
                                                # st.markdown(f"error message: {status_msg}")
                                with add_directory_submit_cols[2]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Cancel",key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_add_directory_cancel', width="stretch"):
                                        st.rerun()

app/backend/st_pages/e2b_poc.py::dialog_.name: dialog_upload_files
app/backend/st_pages/e2b_poc.py::dialog_.source_code:
def dialog_upload_files():
                            st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path}")
                            file_upload_tabs = st.tabs(["Upload files", "Upload a directory"])
                            st.caption("New uploads will replace existing files.")
                            with file_upload_tabs[0]:
                                uploaded_files = st.file_uploader("Select files", accept_multiple_files=True,
                                                                  key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_filesystem_file_uploader_files')
                            with file_upload_tabs[1]:
                                uploaded_directory_files = st.file_uploader("Select directory", accept_multiple_files="directory", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_filesystem_file_uploader_directory')
                            upload_files_submit_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                            with upload_files_submit_cols[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel",
                                                         key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_upload_files_cancel',
                                                         width="stretch"):
                                    st.rerun()

                            with upload_files_submit_cols[0]:
                                if st.button("Upload", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_upload_files_upload',
                                                         width="stretch"):
                                    all_uploaded_files = uploaded_files + uploaded_directory_files
                                    if all_uploaded_files:
                                        e2b_client.sandbox_upload_files(
                                            sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                            parent_path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path,
                                            uploaded_files=all_uploaded_files,
                                            timeout=timeout
                                        )
                                        get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                        st.rerun()
                                    else:
                                        with upload_files_submit_cols[1]:
                                            st.info("Please select files")

def dialog_rename_file_entry(file_entry_path: str, file_entry_type : str = dir):
                            st.info("Renaming works by copying to a new location, then deleting the source item. ")
                            with st.form("form_dialog_rename_file_entry", border=False):
                                st.markdown(f":material/folder_open: {file_entry_path}" if file_entry_type == "dir" else f":material/file_open: {file_entry_path}")

                                new_location = st.text_input("New Location", value=file_entry_path)
                                dialog_rename_submit_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                                with dialog_rename_submit_cols[0]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Submit", key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_rename_file_entry_rename', width="stretch"):
                                        try:
                                            e2b_client.sandbox_file_entry_rename(
                                                sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                                old_path=file_entry_path,
                                                new_path=new_location,
                                                timeout=timeout
                                            )
                                            # fetch updated file entry
                                            get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                            st.rerun()
                                        except Exception as rename_error:
                                            with dialog_rename_submit_cols[1]:
                                                st.error(rename_error)

                                with dialog_rename_submit_cols[2]:
                                    if st.form_submit_button("Cancel",key=f'{st_gui.page_unique_key}_form_dialog_rename_file_entry_cancel', width="stretch"):
                                        st.rerun()

def dialog_delete_files(selected_entries):
                            st.warning("Are you sure you want to delete the following items? This action cannot be undone.")
                            delete_key = f'delete_tree_preview_{selected_sandbox_id}'

                            if delete_key not in st.session_state:
                                with st.spinner("Analyzing file structure..."):
                                    tree_data = []
                                    for entry in selected_entries:
                                        item_structure = {'entry': entry, 'path': entry.path, 'children': None}
                                        if entry.type == FileType.DIR:
                                            item_structure['children'] = e2b_client.sandbox_files_list_recursive(
                                                selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout, max_duration=5.0)
                                        tree_data.append(item_structure)
                                    st.session_state[delete_key] = tree_data

                            with st.container(border=True, gap=None, height=200):
                                if delete_key in st.session_state:
                                    render_file_tree_flat(st.session_state[delete_key])

                            col_submit = st.columns([1, 1, 1])
                            with col_submit[0]:
                                if st.button("Confirm Delete", type="primary", use_container_width=True,
                                             key="btn_confirm_del_final"):
                                    with st.spinner("Deleting..."):
                                        for entry in selected_entries:
                                            e2b_client.sandbox_files_remove(selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout)

                                    # clean_dialog_state()  # 必须清理
                                    get_files_entry(path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                    st.success("Deleted!")
                                    time.sleep(0.5)
                                    st.rerun()

                            with col_submit[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel", key="btn_cancel_delete", use_container_width=True):
                                    st.rerun()

def dialog_download_files(selected_entries):
                            download_key = f'download_tree_preview_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            is_single_file = len(selected_entries) == 1 and selected_entries[0].type == FileType.FILE
                            if not is_single_file:
                                st.write("The selected files will be compressed into a ZIP archive.")

                            status_container = st.empty()
                            with status_container.status("Preparing download...", expanded=True) as status:
                                st.write("Analyzing file structure...")
                                if download_key not in st.session_state:
                                    # 递归获取完整文件列表
                                    full_tree_data = []
                                    for entry in selected_entries:
                                        item_structure = {'entry': entry, 'path': entry.path, 'children': None}
                                        if entry.type == FileType.DIR:
                                            # 设置较长的超时时间，确保打包完整性
                                            item_structure['children'] = e2b_client.sandbox_files_list_recursive(
                                                selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, timeout, max_duration=5.0)
                                        full_tree_data.append(item_structure)

                                    st.session_state[download_key] = full_tree_data

                                # st.write("Compressing files...")

                            st.markdown("##### File List")
                            with st.container(border=True, gap=None, height=200):
                                if download_key in st.session_state:
                                    render_file_tree_flat(st.session_state[download_key])

                            col_submit = st.columns([1, 1, 1])

                            with col_submit[0]:
                                if is_single_file:
                                    entry = selected_entries[0]

                                    st.download_button(
                                        label="⬇️ Download File",
                                        data=lambda: e2b_client.get_file_data(selected_sandbox_id, entry.path, 60),
                                        file_name=entry.name,
                                        # mime=entry.type,
                                        on_click="ignore",
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        type="primary",
                                        key="btn_auto_download_ready"
                                    )
                                else:
                                    selected_paths = [entry.path for entry in selected_entries]
                                    st.download_button(
                                        label="⬇️ Download ZIP",
                                        data=lambda: e2b_client.create_zip_in_sandbox(selected_sandbox_id, selected_paths, 100),
                                        file_name=f"sandbox_files_{int(time.time())}.zip",
                                        mime="application/zip",
                                        on_click="ignore",
                                        use_container_width=True,
                                        type="primary",
                                        key="btn_auto_download_ready"
                                    )

                            with col_submit[2]:
                                if st.button("Cancel", key="btn_cancel_dl", use_container_width=True):
                                    st.rerun()

                            status.update(label="Ready!", state="complete", expanded=False)

app/backend/st_pages/e2b_poc.py::dialog_.source_code:
def dialog_file_detail(file_entry):
                            # clean_dialog_state()

                            # 用文件路径作为标记，确保切换文件时强制刷新
                            last_file_key = f'file_detail_last_path_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            content_key = f'file_detail_content_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            edited_key = f'file_detail_edited_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            category_key = f'file_detail_category_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                            editor_key = f'file_detail_editor_{selected_sandbox_id}'

                            if st.session_state.get(last_file_key) != file_entry.path:
                                for k in [content_key, edited_key, category_key, editor_key]:
                                    if k in st.session_state:
                                        del st.session_state[k]
                                st.session_state[last_file_key] = file_entry.path


                            def load_file_content():
                                """从 sandbox 加载文件，写入 session_state"""
                                raw = e2b_client.sandbox_files_read_bytes(
                                    sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                    path=file_entry.path,
                                    timeout=60
                                )
                                file_bytes = bytes(raw)
                                category = e2b_client.detect_file_category(file_bytes, file_entry.name)
                                st.session_state[category_key] = category
                                st.session_state[content_key] = file_bytes
                                st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                # if editor_key in st.session_state:
                                #     del st.session_state[editor_key]

                            file_path = file_entry.path
                            SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES = 15 * 1024 * 1024  # 15MB

                            # ── 首次加载 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
                            if content_key not in st.session_state:
                                if file_entry.size > SIZE_LIMIT_BYTES:
                                    # 超限：只存一个标记，不读文件
                                    st.session_state[content_key] = b''  # 占位，防止重复触发
                                    st.session_state[category_key] = '__overlimit__'
                                    st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                else:
                                    with st.spinner("Loading file..."):
                                        try:
                                            load_file_content()
                                        except Exception as e:
                                            st.error(f"Failed to load file: {e}")
                                            st.stop()

                            file_bytes: bytes = st.session_state[content_key]
                            file_category: str = st.session_state.get(category_key, 'binary')
                            is_text = file_category == 'text'
                            is_image = file_category == 'image'
                            is_video = file_category == 'video'
                            is_audio = file_category == 'audio'
                            is_overlimit = st.session_state.get(category_key) == '__overlimit__'

                            # ── 顶部文件名 + 元信息 ───────────────────────────────────────
                            file_name = file_entry.name
                            file_ext = PurePosixPath(file_name).suffix.lower() or 'unknown'
                            file_size_str = e2b_client.format_file_size(file_entry.size)
                            display_name = file_name if len(file_name) <= 60 else file_name[:57] + "..."
                            st.markdown(f"### {display_name}", help=file_name if len(file_name) > 60 else None)
                            st.caption(f"Type: `{file_ext}`　　Size: `{file_size_str}`　　Path: `{file_entry.path}`")
                            # allow_display = file_entry.size <= 20 * 1024 * 1024  # 20MB
                            # st.divider()

                            # ── 六个操作标签按钮 ──────────────────────────────────────────
                            # tab_edit, tab_download, tab_delete, tab_refresh, tab_save, tab_discard = st.tabs([
                            #     "✏️ Edit", "⬇️ Download", "🗑️ Delete", "🔄 Refresh", "💾 Save", "↩️ Discard"
                            # ])
                            tab_edit, tab_download, tab_delete = st.tabs([
                                "✏️ Edit", "⬇️ Download", "🗑️ Delete"
                            ])

                            # ── Edit 标签 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_edit:
                                if is_overlimit:
                                    st.warning(f"This file is **{file_size_str}**, which exceeds the 15 MB preview limit. Please download the file to view its content.")
                                elif is_text:
                                    has_edits = st.session_state.get(edited_key, False)
                                    action_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 6])
                                    with action_cols[0]:
                                        if st.button(
                                                "💾 Save", type="primary",
                                                disabled=not has_edits,
                                                use_container_width=True,
                                                key=f'file_detail_save_inline_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        ):
                                            with st.spinner("Saving..."):
                                                try:
                                                    save_content = st.session_state.get(content_key, b'')
                                                    if isinstance(save_content, bytes):
                                                        save_content = save_content.decode('utf-8')
                                                    e2b_client.sandbox_files_write_text(
                                                        sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id,
                                                        path=file_entry.path,
                                                        content=save_content,
                                                        timeout=timeout
                                                    )
                                                    st.session_state[edited_key] = False
                                                    st.success("Saved.")
                                                except Exception as e:
                                                    st.error(f"Save failed: {e}")
                                    with action_cols[1]:
                                        if st.button(
                                                "↩️ Discard",
                                                disabled=not has_edits,
                                                use_container_width=True,
                                                key=f'file_detail_discard_inline_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        ):
                                            for k in [content_key, edited_key, category_key, editor_key]:
                                                if k in st.session_state:
                                                    del st.session_state[k]
                                            st.rerun()

                                    text_content = file_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                                    text_content = e2b_client.strip_ansi(text_content)  # 剥离 ANSI 转义码

                                    def on_change_editor():
                                        st.session_state[edited_key] = True
                                        # 将编辑后的内容同步回 content_key（以 bytes 形式存储）
                                        # editor_key = f'file_detail_editor_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                        if editor_key in st.session_state:
                                            st.session_state[content_key] = st.session_state[editor_key].encode('utf-8')

                                    st.text_area(
                                        label="File content",
                                        value=text_content,
                                        height=450,
                                        label_visibility="collapsed",
                                        key=editor_key,
                                        on_change=on_change_editor
                                    )

                                    if st.session_state.get(edited_key):
                                        st.caption("⚠️ Unsaved changes — use the **Save** or **Discard** button.")

                                elif is_image:
                                    st.image(file_bytes)

                                elif is_video:
                                    st.video(file_bytes)

                                elif is_audio:
                                    st.audio(file_bytes)

                                elif file_ext == '.pdf':
                                    # st.pdf(file_bytes)
                                    import base64
                                    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode('utf-8')
                                    pdf_html = f'''
                                            <iframe
                                                src="data:application/pdf;base64,{b64}"
                                                width="100%"
                                                height="500px"
                                                style="border: none; border-radius: 4px;"
                                            ></iframe>
                                        '''
                                    st.markdown(pdf_html, unsafe_allow_html=True)

                                else:
                                    st.info("Preview is not supported for this file type. You can still download it.")

                            # ── Download 标签 ─────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_download:
                                st.info(f"Download **{file_name}** from sandbox.")

                                st.download_button(
                                    label=f"⬇️ Download {file_name}",
                                    data=lambda: e2b_client.get_file_data(sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, path=file_path, timeout=60),
                                    file_name=file_name,
                                    on_click="ignore",
                                    use_container_width=True,
                                    type="primary",
                                    key=f'file_detail_download_btn_{selected_sandbox_id}'
                                )

                            # ── Delete 标签 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
                            with tab_delete:
                                st.warning(
                                    f"Are you sure you want to delete **{file_name}**? This action cannot be undone.")
                                delete_cols = st.columns([1, 1, 2])
                                with delete_cols[0]:
                                    if st.button("Confirm Delete", type="primary", use_container_width=True,
                                                 key=f'file_detail_confirm_delete_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                                        with st.spinner("Deleting..."):
                                            try:
                                                e2b_client.sandbox_files_remove(
                                                    sandbox_id=selected_sandbox_id, path=file_path, timeout=timeout)
                                                get_files_entry(
                                                    path=selected_sandbox_page_config.sandbox_entry_current_path)
                                                st.success("Deleted successfully.")
                                                import time as _time;
                                                _time.sleep(0.5)
                                                st.rerun()
                                            except Exception as e:
                                                st.error(f"Failed to delete: {e}")
                                with delete_cols[1]:
                                    if st.button("Cancel", use_container_width=True,
                                                 key=f'file_detail_cancel_delete_{selected_sandbox_id}'):
                                        st.rerun()

app/backend/utils/Vibe_Apps/vibe_app_uti.name: VibeAppClient
app/backend/utils/Vibe_Apps/vibe_app_uti.source_code:
class VibeAppClient:
    def __init__(self, user_id: str, user_name: str = None, user_email: str = None):
        self.user_id = user_id
        self.user_name = user_name
        self.user_email = user_email

    def import_vibe_app(self, name: str, host: str, agent_type="web"):
        try:
            agent_type = agent_type.lower()
            new_assistant_id = f"{agent_type}_{str(uuid.uuid1()).replace('-', '')}"
            truncate_name = name if len(name) < 250 else name[:247] + "..."
            verified_host = host.strip().strip('/').lower()

            conn = init_connection()
            with conn:
                with conn.cursor() as cursor:
                    cursor.execute(
                        "INSERT INTO Table_LFAIPortal_Assistant (Assistant_Id, Assistant_Name, Assistant_Status, Host, Agent_Type,Created_By,Created_By_Id) "
                        "OUTPUT INSERTED.Assistant_Id "
                        "SELECT ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? "
                        "WHERE NOT EXISTS ( "
                        "SELECT 1 FROM Table_LFAIPortal_Assistant WHERE Host = ? "
                        ")",
                        (new_assistant_id, truncate_name, 'Active', verified_host, agent_type, self.user_name, self.user_id, verified_host))
                    row = cursor.fetchone()
                    if row:
                        return True, str(row[0])
            return False, "Host existed"
        except Exception as e:
            print(traceback.format_exc())
            return False, e

    def update_vibe_app(self, assistant_id: str, name: str, host: str):
        conn = init_connection()
        with conn:
            with conn.cursor() as cursor:
                sql = "update Table_LFAIPortal_Assistant set Assistant_Name =?, Host =?, Update_BY =?, Update_Timestamp =? where Assistant_Id =?"
                cursor.execute(sql, (
                name, host, self.user_name, datetime.now(UTC), assistant_id))
            conn.commit()

def api_subscription_management_fragment(user_id: str,user_email: str,user_name: str):
    st.subheader("API Subscription Management")
    # 使用缓存方法减少数据库查询，页面加载只查数据库，不走API
    user_subscriptions = cache_user_subscriptions_db_only(user_id)
    if user_subscriptions:
        st.success(f"Found {len(user_subscriptions)} subscription(s)")
        subscription_empty = st.empty()
        if user_subscriptions:
            with subscription_empty.expander("Subscription:", expanded=True):
                subscription_cols = st.columns([2, 2, 1, 1])
            with subscription_cols[0]:
                write_text_using_html("Primary Key")
            with subscription_cols[1]:
                write_text_using_html("Secondary Key")
            with subscription_cols[2]:
                write_text_using_html("Regenerate Keys")
            with subscription_cols[3]:
                write_text_using_html("Delete")
            for i, subscription in enumerate(user_subscriptions):
                with subscription_cols[0]:
                    st.text_input("Primary Key", value=subscription['Primary_Key'], type="password", key=f"primary_key_{i}", disabled=True, label_visibility="collapsed")
                with subscription_cols[1]:
                    st.text_input("Secondary Key", value=subscription['Secondary_Key'], type="password", key=f"secondary_key_{i}", disabled=True, label_visibility="collapsed")
                    # st.text(f"Email: {subscription['Email']}")
                    # st.text(f"Registered: {subscription['Registration_Timestamp']}")
                with subscription_cols[2]:
                    if st.button("Regenerate", key=f"regenerate_{i}", use_container_width=True):
                        with st.spinner("Regenerating subscription keys..."):
                            result = regenerate_subscription_keys(
                                subscription_id=subscription['Subscription_Id'],
                                user_id=user_id
                            )
                            if result['success']:
                                st.success("Keys regenerated successfully!")
                                clear_user_subscriptions_db_cache(user_id)
                                st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                            else:
                                st.error(f"Failed to regenerate keys: {result['error']}")
                with subscription_cols[3]:
                    if st.button("Delete", key=f"delete_{i}", use_container_width=True, type="primary"):
                        with st.spinner("Deleting subscription..."):
                            result = delete_user_subscription(
                                subscription_id=subscription['Subscription_Id'],
                                user_id=user_id
                            )
                            if result['success']:
                                st.success("Subscription deleted successfully!")
                                clear_user_subscriptions_db_cache(user_id)
                                st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                            else:
                                st.error(f"Failed to delete subscription: {result['error']}")
    else:
        st.info("No subscription key found. Create one to use AIPortal API.")
        if st.button("Generate Subscription", type="primary", use_container_width=True):
            with st.spinner("Creating subscription..."):
                # 只有点击按钮时才查API并补库
                from utils.apim_utils import create_user_subscription
                result = create_user_subscription(
                    user_email=user_email,
                    user_id=user_id,
                    user_name=user_name
                )
                if result['success']:
                    st.success("Subscription created successfully!")
                    clear_user_subscriptions_db_cache(user_id)
                    st.rerun(scope="fragment")
                else:
                    st.error(f"Failed to create subscription: {result['error']}")

def agent_api_help_info(agent_id: str, user_name: str, user_email: str):
    with st.expander("API request example", expanded=False):
        tab_list = ["HTTP", "Python", "JavaScript"]
        tabs = st.tabs(tab_list)
        with tabs[0]:
            st.code(
                f'POST {AGENT_API_ROUTER_URL}',
                language="http"
            )
            st.markdown("""
    **Header**：
    ```http
    Content-Type: application/json
    Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: <Your-primary-key>
    ```

    **Body**：
    ```json
    {
      "question": "Your questions.", // skip in smart extraction processor
      "agent_id": "your agent_id",
      "user_email": "your user_email",
      "thread_id": "your thread_id" // optional parameter,
      "files": [
        {
            "mime_type": "application/pdf",
            "file_name": "test.pdf",
            "file_data": "file content in base64 string"
        }
      ] // files available for smart extraction processor
    }
    ```
                """)
        with tabs[1]:
            st.code(
                f'''import requests

url = "{AGENT_API_ROUTER_URL}"
headers = {{
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key": "<Your-primary-key>"
}}
data = {{
    "question": "Your questions.", # skip in smart extraction processor
    "agent_id": "your agent_id",
    "user_email": "your user_email",
    # "thread_id": "your thread_id"  # optional parameter
}}
response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)
print(response.text)
''',
                language="python"
            )
        with tabs[2]:
            st.code(
                f'''fetch("{AGENT_API_ROUTER_URL}", {{
  method: "POST",
  headers: {{
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key": "<Your-primary-key>"
  }},

}})
  .then(res => res.json())

''',

class BaseChatSession:
    def __init__(self, session_name: str = '', session_created_on: datetime = datetime.now(UTC), zep_thread_id: str = None):
        self.session_name = session_name
        self.chat_history = []
        self.status: Literal["new","in_progress", "completed", 'failed'] = 'new'
        self.session_created_on: datetime = session_created_on
        self.temp_files = []
        self.zep_thread_id = zep_thread_id

    def get_chat_name(self):
        created_at = localize_datetime(self.session_created_on).strftime('%m/%d/%Y %H:%M') if self.session_created_on else '-'
        return f"{self.session_name} ({created_at})" if self.session_name else created_at

def call_func_in_st_background_with_callback(func_call, args=()):
    print(f"call_func_in_st_background_with_callback - start")
    wt = threading.Thread(target=func_call, args=args, daemon=True)
    add_script_run_ctx(wt)
    wt.start()
    wt.join()

    print(f"call_func_in_st_background_with_callback - end")
    st.rerun()

app/backend/utils/ai_store_utils.py::_re.source_code:
def _resolve_store_item_thumbnail_for_display(item):
    """Return (kind, payload) for thumbnail display.

    Priority:
    1) Blob URL (thumbnail_image_url) with SAS
    2) DB bytes (thumbnail_image)
    3) Default local icon

    kind: 'url' | 'bytes' | 'default'
    payload: sas_url | bytes | './static/app_icon.png'
    """
    try:
        url = getattr(item, 'thumbnail_image_url', None)
        if url:
            sas_url = get_azure_blob_sas_url(url)
            if sas_url:
                return 'url', sas_url
    except Exception:
        pass

    img_bytes = getattr(item, 'thumbnail_image', None)
    if img_bytes:
        return 'bytes', img_bytes

    return 'default', './static/app_icon.png'
